Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.\\nlicense: Complete terms in LICENSE.txt\\n---\\n\\nThis skill guides creation of distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic \\\"AI slop\\\" aesthetics. Implement real working code with exceptional attention to aesthetic details and creative choices.\\n\\nThe user provides frontend requirements: a component, page, application, or interface to build. They may include context about the purpose, audience, or technical constraints.\\n\\n## Design Thinking\\n\\nBefore coding, understand the context and commit to a BOLD aesthetic direction:\\n- **Purpose**: What problem does this interface solve? Who uses it?\\n- **Tone**: Pick an extreme: brutally minimal, maximalist chaos, retro-futuristic, organic/natural, luxury/refined, playful/toy-like, editorial/magazine, brutalist/raw, art deco/geometric, soft/pastel, industrial/utilitarian, etc. There are so many flavors to choose from. Use these for inspiration but design one that is true to the aesthetic direction.\\n- **Constraints**: Technical requirements (framework, performance, accessibility).\\n- **Differentiation**: What makes this UNFORGETTABLE? What's the one thing someone will remember?\\n\\n**CRITICAL**: Choose a clear conceptual direction and execute it with precision. Bold maximalism and refined minimalism both work - the key is intentionality, not intensity.\\n\\nThen implement working code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue, etc.) that is:\\n- Production-grade and functional\\n- Visually striking and memorable\\n- Cohesive with a clear aesthetic point-of-view\\n- Meticulously refined in every detail\\n\\n## Frontend Aesthetics Guidelines\\n\\nFocus on:\\n- **Typography**: Choose fonts that are beautiful, unique, and interesting. Avoid generic fonts like Arial and Inter; opt instead for distinctive choices that elevate the frontend's aesthetics; unexpected, characterful font choices. Pair a distinctive display font with a refined body font.\\n- **Color & Theme**: Commit to a cohesive aesthetic. Use CSS variables for consistency. Dominant colors with sharp accents outperform timid, evenly-distributed palettes.\\n- **Motion**: Use animations for effects and micro-interactions. Prioritize CSS-only solutions for HTML. Use Motion library for React when available. Focus on high-impact moments: one well-orchestrated page load with staggered reveals (animation-delay) creates more delight than scattered micro-interactions. Use scroll-triggering and hover states that surprise.\\n- **Spatial Composition**: Unexpected layouts. Asymmetry. Overlap. Diagonal flow. Grid-breaking elements. Generous negative space OR controlled density.\\n- **Backgrounds & Visual Details**: Create atmosphere and depth rather than defaulting to solid colors. Add contextual effects and textures that match the overall aesthetic. Apply creative forms like gradient meshes, noise textures, geometric patterns, layered transparencies, dramatic shadows, decorative borders, custom cursors, and grain overlays.\\n\\nNEVER use generic AI-generated aesthetics like overused font families (Inter, Roboto, Arial, system fonts), cliched color schemes (particularly purple gradients on white backgrounds), predictable layouts and component patterns, and cookie-cutter design that lacks context-specific character.\\n\\nInterpret creatively and make unexpected choices that feel genuinely designed for the context. No design should be the same. Vary between light and dark themes, different fonts, different aesthetics. NEVER converge on common choices (Space Grotesk, for example) across generations.\\n\\n**IMPORTANT**: Match implementation complexity to the aesthetic vision. Maximalist designs need elaborate code with extensive animations and effects. Minimalist or refined designs need restraint, precision, and careful attention to spacing, typography, and subtle details. Elegance comes from executing the vision well.\\n\\nRemember: Claude is capable of extraordinary creative work. Don't hold back, show what can truly be created when thinking outside the box and committing fully to a distinctive vision.\\n\",\"stderr\":\"\"}",

      "json_block": "{\"returncode\":0,\"stdout\":\"---\\nname: frontend-design\\ndescription: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.\\nlicense: Complete terms in LICENSE.txt\\n---\\n\\nThis skill guides creation of distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic \\\"AI slop\\\" aesthetics. Implement real working code with exceptional attention to aesthetic details and creative choices.\\n\\nThe user provides frontend requirements: a component, page, application, or interface to build. They may include context about the purpose, audience, or technical constraints.\\n\\n## Design Thinking\\n\\nBefore coding, understand the context and commit to a BOLD aesthetic direction:\\n- **Purpose**: What problem does this interface solve? Who uses it?\\n- **Tone**: Pick an extreme: brutally minimal, maximalist chaos, retro-futuristic, organic/natural, luxury/refined, playful/toy-like, editorial/magazine, brutalist/raw, art deco/geometric, soft/pastel, industrial/utilitarian, etc. There are so many flavors to choose from. Use these for inspiration but design one that is true to the aesthetic direction.\\n- **Constraints**: Technical requirements (framework, performance, accessibility).\\n- **Differentiation**: What makes this UNFORGETTABLE? What's the one thing someone will remember?\\n\\n**CRITICAL**: Choose a clear conceptual direction and execute it with precision. Bold maximalism and refined minimalism both work - the key is intentionality, not intensity.\\n\\nThen implement working code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue, etc.) that is:\\n- Production-grade and functional\\n- Visually striking and memorable\\n- Cohesive with a clear aesthetic point-of-view\\n- Meticulously refined in every detail\\n\\n## Frontend Aesthetics Guidelines\\n\\nFocus on:\\n- **Typography**: Choose fonts that are beautiful, unique, and interesting. Avoid generic fonts like Arial and Inter; opt instead for distinctive choices that elevate the frontend's aesthetics; unexpected, characterful font choices. Pair a distinctive display font with a refined body font.\\n- **Color & Theme**: Commit to a cohesive aesthetic. Use CSS variables for consistency. Dominant colors with sharp accents outperform timid, evenly-distributed palettes.\\n- **Motion**: Use animations for effects and micro-interactions. Prioritize CSS-only solutions for HTML. Use Motion library for React when available. Focus on high-impact moments: one well-orchestrated page load with staggered reveals (animation-delay) creates more delight than scattered micro-interactions. Use scroll-triggering and hover states that surprise.\\n- **Spatial Composition**: Unexpected layouts. Asymmetry. Overlap. Diagonal flow. Grid-breaking elements. Generous negative space OR controlled density.\\n- **Backgrounds & Visual Details**: Create atmosphere and depth rather than defaulting to solid colors. Add contextual effects and textures that match the overall aesthetic. Apply creative forms like gradient meshes, noise textures, geometric patterns, layered transparencies, dramatic shadows, decorative borders, custom cursors, and grain overlays.\\n\\nNEVER use generic AI-generated aesthetics like overused font families (Inter, Roboto, Arial, system fonts), cliched color schemes (particularly purple gradients on white backgrounds), predictable layouts and component patterns, and cookie-cutter design that lacks context-specific character.\\n\\nInterpret creatively and make unexpected choices that feel genuinely designed for the context. No design should be the same. Vary between light and dark themes, different fonts, different aesthetics. NEVER converge on common choices (Space Grotesk, for example) across generations.\\n\\n**IMPORTANT**: Match implementation complexity to the aesthetic vision. Maximalist designs need elaborate code with extensive animations and effects. Minimalist or refined designs need restraint, precision, and careful attention to spacing, typography, and subtle details. Elegance comes from executing the vision well.\\n\\nRemember: Claude is capable of extraordinary creative work. Don't hold back, show what can truly be created when thinking outside the box and committing fully to a distinctive vision.\\n\",\"stderr\":\"\"}"

Tamiyo, Kaito, Nethergoyf \u2014 8 unblocked \u2192 o at 3\"],\n      [\"OPP\",\"Draw: Veil of Summer\"],\n      [\"BUG\",\"Draw: Murktide Regent\"],\n      [\"BUG\",\"Attack: Orcish Bowmasters, Tamiyo, Kaito, Nethergoyf, Nethergoyf \u2014 12 unblocked \u2192 o at -9\"]\n    ]\n  }\n];\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Log rendering \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nfunction renderLogs() {\n  const container = document.getElementById('game-log-container');\n  MATCH.forEach(g => {\n    const isKey = l => l[2] === 'KEY' || l[1].startsWith('\u2605');\n    const side  = l => l[0] === 'BUG' ? 'bug' : 'opp';\n\n    const handHtml = (cards, label) => `\n      <div class=\"hand-block\">\n        <div class=\"hand-label\">${label}</div>\n        <div class=\"hand-cards\">${cards.map(c => `<span class=\"card-pill\">${c}</span>`).join('')}</div>\n      </div>`;\n\n    const logLines = g.log.map(l => `\n      <div class=\"log-line ${isKey(l)?'key-play':''} ${side(l)+'-action'}\">\n        <span class=\"log-tag ${side(l)} ${isKey(l)?'key'}\">${g.game}T\u00b7 [${l[0]}]</span>\n        <span class=\"log-text\">${l[1]}</span>\n      </div>`).join('');\n\n    const winColor = g.winner === 'BUG' ? 'var(--bug)' : 'var(--storm)';\n\n    container.innerHTML += `\n      <div class=\"game-header\">\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"game-title\">Game ${g.game} \u2014 ${g.phase}</div>\n          <div class=\"game-meta\">${g.bug_first?'BUG':'Storm'} on play \u00b7 Turn ${g.turn}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div style=\"text-align:right\">\n          <div style=\"font-family:var(--display);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:${winColor}\">${g.winner} wins</div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)\">BUG@${g.bug_life} Storm@${g.storm_life}</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"hands\">\n        ${handHtml(g.bug_hand, 'BUG opening hand')}\n        ${handHtml(g.storm_hand, 'Storm opening hand')}\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"log-body\">${logLines}</div>`;\n\n    if (g.game < MATCH.length) {\n      container.innerHTML += `<div style=\"border-top:2px solid var(--border)\"></div>`;\n    }\n  });\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Tab switching \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nfunction switchTab(name) {\n  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));\n  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));\n  document.querySelector(`[onclick=\"switchTab('${name}')\"]`).classList.add('active');\n  document.getElementById(`panel-${name}`).classList.add('active');\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 LLM Judge \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nfunction buildPrompt() {\n  const matchText = MATCH.map(g => {\n    const logStr = g.log.map(l => `  [${l[0]}] ${l[1]}`).join('\\n');\n    return `\n=== GAME ${g.game} (${g.phase}, ${g.bug_first?'BUG':'Storm'} on play) ===\nBUG hand:   ${g.bug_hand.join(', ')}\nStorm hand: ${g.storm_hand.join(', ')}\nResult: ${g.winner} wins on Turn ${g.turn} | BUG@${g.bug_life} Storm@${g.storm_life}\nReason: ${g.reason}\n---\n${logStr}`;\n  }).join('\\n\\n');\n\n  return `You are an expert Legacy Magic: The Gathering judge reviewing a simulated match between BUG Tempo and ANT Storm. Your task is to critically evaluate the play decisions of both decks across all three games and identify:\n\n1. CORRECT plays \u2014 decisions that align with optimal Legacy strategy\n2. ERRORS \u2014 clear rule violations or mechanically wrong plays  \n3. SUBOPTIMAL plays \u2014 legal but strategically wrong decisions a real expert would not make\n4. MODEL GAPS \u2014 places where the simulator clearly deviates from real play patterns\n\nFor each finding, be specific: cite the exact game, turn, and action. Explain WHY it is correct/wrong using Legacy rules and established BUG Tempo / Storm strategy.\n\nFocus especially on:\n- Thoughtseize target selection (is the right card being stripped?)\n- Counter usage (FoW/FoN/Daze timing and targets)\n- Wasteland sequencing\n- Storm's combo sequencing and when it fires/doesn't fire\n- The G1 mulligan question (should BUG have mulliganed?)\n- Bowmasters deployment timing\n- Whether the G1 loss was preventable given the BUG hand\n\nBe direct and critical. Do not hedge. Format your response as:\n\nSCORES (1-10):\n- BUG play quality: X/10\n- Storm play quality: X/10  \n- Model realism: X/10\n- Overall: X/10\n\nCORRECT PLAYS (list each with game/turn/why)\n\nERRORS (list each with game/turn/why)\n\nSUBOPTIMAL PLAYS (list each with game/turn/why)\n\nMODEL GAPS (systemic issues, not single plays)\n\nVERDICT (2-3 sentences overall assessment)\n\nHere is the full match log:\n\n${matchText}`;\n}\n\nasync function runJudge() {\n  const btn = document.getElementById('run-btn');\n  const loading = document.getElementById('judge-loading');\n  const output = document.getElementById('judge-output');\n  const error  = document.getElementById('judge-error');\n  const status = document.getElementById('judge-status');\n  const dot    = document.getElementById('status-dot');\n\n  btn.disabled = true;\n  loading.style.display = 'flex';\n  output.style.display = 'none';\n  error.style.display  = 'none';\n  dot.style.background = 'var(--gold)';\n\n  const steps = [\n    'Sending match log to Claude\u2026',\n    'Analysing G1 Thoughtseize sequencing\u2026',\n    'Evaluating counter usage across all games\u2026',\n    'Reviewing Storm combo lines\u2026',\n    'Assessing model realism\u2026',\n  ];\n  let step = 0;\n  const ticker = setInterval(() => {\n    status.textContent = steps[Math.min(++step, steps.length-1)];\n  }, 2800);\n\n  try {\n    const resp = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n      body: JSON.stringify({\n        model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',\n        max_tokens: 1000,\n        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: buildPrompt() }]\n      })\n    });\n\n    clearInterval(ticker);\n    const data = await resp.json();\n    const text = data.content?.map(b => b.text || '').join('') || '';\n\n    if (!text) throw new Error('Empty response from API');\n\n    renderJudgeOutput(text);\n    dot.style.background = 'var(--green)';\n\n  } catch(e) {\n    clearInterval(ticker);\n    error.textContent = `Judge error: ${e.message}`;\n    error.style.display = 'block';\n    dot.style.background = 'var(--red)';\n  } finally {\n    loading.style.display = 'none';\n    btn.disabled = false;\n    btn.textContent = 'Re-run Judge Analysis';\n  }\n}\n\nfunction renderJudgeOutput(raw) {\n  const output = document.getElementById('judge-output');\n\n  // Parse scores\n  const scores = {};\n  const scoreBlock = raw.match(/SCORES[\\s\\S]*?(?=\\n[A-Z])/)?.[0] || '';\n  scoreBlock.replace(/- (.+?):\\s*(\\d+)\\/10/g, (_, k, v) => scores[k.trim()] = +v);\n\n  const scoreKeys = ['BUG play quality','Storm play quality','Model realism','Overall'];\n  const scoreHtml = scoreKeys.map(k => {\n    const v = scores[k] ?? '?';\n    const color = v >= 8 ? 'var(--green)' : v >= 6 ? 'var(--gold)' : 'var(--red)';\n    return `<div class=\"score-box\">\n      <div class=\"score-num\" style=\"color:${color}\">${v}</div>\n      <div class=\"score-label\">${k}</div>\n    </div>`;\n  }).join('');\n\n  // Parse sections\n  function extractSection(title, type) {\n    const re = new RegExp(`${title}[\\\\s\\\\S]*?(?=\\\\n[A-Z]{2,}|$)`);\n    const block = raw.match(re)?.[0] || '';\n    const items = block.split('\\n').slice(1).filter(l => l.trim() && !l.startsWith(title));\n    return items.map(l => `\n      <div class=\"finding ${type}\">\n        <div class=\"finding-label\">${type.toUpperCase()}</div>\n        <div class=\"finding-text\">${l.replace(/^[-\u2022*]\\s*/, '')}</div>\n      </div>`).join('');\n  }\n\n  const verdict = raw.match(/VERDICT[\\s\\S]*$/)?.[0]?.replace(/^VERDICT\\s*/,'').trim() || '';\n\n  output.innerHTML = `\n    <div class=\"judge-section\">\n      <div class=\"judge-section-title\"><span class=\"section-icon\">\ud83d\udcca</span>Scores</div>\n      <div class=\"score-grid\">${scoreHtml}</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"judge-section\">\n      <div class=\"judge-section-title\"><span class=\"section-icon\">\u2705</span>Correct Plays</div>\n      ${extractSection('CORRECT PLAYS', 'correct') || '<div class=\"finding info\"><div class=\"finding-text\">None flagged.</div></div>'}\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"judge-section\">\n      <div class=\"judge-section-title\"><span class=\"section-icon\">\u274c</span>Errors</div>\n      ${extractSection('ERRORS', 'error') || '<div class=\"finding info\"><div class=\"finding-text\">No errors found.</div></div>'}\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"judge-section\">\n      <div class=\"judge-section-title\"><span class=\"section-icon\">\u26a0\ufe0f</span>Suboptimal Plays</div>\n      ${extractSection('SUBOPTIMAL', 'subopt') || '<div class=\"finding info\"><div class=\"finding-text\">None flagged.</div></div>'}\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"judge-section\">\n      <div class=\"judge-section-title\"><span class=\"section-icon\">\ud83d\udd2c</span>Model Gaps</div>\n      ${extractSection('MODEL GAPS', 'info') || '<div class=\"finding info\"><div class=\"finding-text\">None identified.</div></div>'}\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"verdict-box\">\n      <div class=\"verdict-title\">Verdict</div>\n      <div class=\"verdict-text\">${verdict.replace(/\\n/g,'<br>')}</div>\n    </div>`;\n\n  output.style.display = 'block';\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Init \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nrenderLogs();\n</script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"

\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\nfunction renderLogs() {\\n  const container = document.getElementById('game-log-container');\\n  MATCH.forEach(g => {\\n    const isKey = l => l[2] === 'KEY' || l[1].startsWith('\\u2605');\\n    const side  = l => l[0] === 'BUG' ? 'bug' : 'opp';\\n\\n    const handHtml = (cards, label) => `\\n      <div class=\\\"hand-block\\\">\\n        <div class=\\\"hand-label\\\">${label}</div>\\n        <div class=\\\"hand-cards\\\">${cards.map(c => `<span class=\\\"card-pill\\\">${c}</span>`).join('')}</div>\\n      </div>`;\\n\\n    const logLines = g.log.map(l => `\\n      <div class=\\\"log-line ${isKey(l)?'key-play':''} ${side(l)+'-action'}\\\">\\n        <span class=\\\"log-tag ${side(l)} ${isKey(l)?'key'}\\\">${g.game}T\\u00b7 [${l[0]}]</span>\\n        <span class=\\\"log-text\\\">${l[1]}</span>\\n      </div>`).join('');\\n\\n    const winColor = g.winner === 'BUG' ? 'var(--bug)' : 'var(--storm)';\\n\\n    container.innerHTML += `\\n      <div class=\\\"game-header\\\">\\n        <div>\\n          <div class=\\\"game-title\\\">Game ${g.game} \\u2014 ${g.phase}</div>\\n          <div class=\\\"game-meta\\\">${g.bug_first?'BUG':'Storm'} on play \\u00b7 Turn ${g.turn}</div>\\n        </div>\\n        <div style=\\\"text-align:right\\\">\\n          <div style=\\\"font-family:var(--display);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:${winColor}\\\">${g.winner} wins</div>\\n          <div style=\\\"font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)\\\">BUG@${g.bug_life} Storm@${g.storm_life}</div>\\n        </div>\\n      </div>\\n      <div class=\\\"hands\\\">\\n        ${handHtml(g.bug_hand, 'BUG opening hand')}\\n        ${handHtml(g.storm_hand, 'Storm opening hand')}\\n      </div>\\n      <div class=\\\"log-body\\\">${logLines}</div>`;\\n\\n    if (g.game < MATCH.length) {\\n      container.innerHTML += `<div style=\\\"border-top:2px solid var(--border)\\\"></div>`;\\n    }\\n  });\\n}\\n\\n// \\u2500\\u2500 Tab switching \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\nfunction switchTab(name) {\\n  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));\\n  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));\\n  document.querySelector(`[onclick=\\\"switchTab('${name}')\\\"]`).classList.add('active');\\n  document.getElementById(`panel-${name}`).classList.add('active');\\n}\\n\\n// \\u2500\\u2500 LLM Judge \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\nfunction buildPrompt() {\\n  const matchText = MATCH.map(g => {\\n    const logStr = g.log.map(l => `  [${l[0]}] ${l[1]}`).join('\\\\n');\\n    return `\\n=== GAME ${g.game} (${g.phase}, ${g.bug_first?'BUG':'Storm'} on play) ===\\nBUG hand:   ${g.bug_hand.join(', ')}\\nStorm hand: ${g.storm_hand.join(', ')}\\nResult: ${g.winner} wins on Turn ${g.turn} | BUG@${g.bug_life} Storm@${g.storm_life}\\nReason: ${g.reason}\\n---\\n${logStr}`;\\n  }).join('\\\\n\\\\n');\\n\\n  return `You are an expert Legacy Magic: The Gathering judge reviewing a simulated match between BUG Tempo and ANT Storm. Your task is to critically evaluate the play decisions of both decks across all three games and identify:\\n\\n1. CORRECT plays \\u2014 decisions that align with optimal Legacy strategy\\n2. ERRORS \\u2014 clear rule violations or mechanically wrong plays  \\n3. SUBOPTIMAL plays \\u2014 legal but strategically wrong decisions a real expert would not make\\n4. MODEL GAPS \\u2014 places where the simulator clearly deviates from real play patterns\\n\\nFor each finding, be specific: cite the exact game, turn, and action. Explain WHY it is correct/wrong using Legacy rules and established BUG Tempo / Storm strategy.\\n\\nFocus especially on:\\n- Thoughtseize target selection (is the right card being stripped?)\\n- Counter usage (FoW/FoN/Daze timing and targets)\\n- Wasteland sequencing\\n- Storm's combo sequencing and when it fires/doesn't fire\\n- The G1 mulligan question (should BUG have mulliganed?)\\n- Bowmasters deployment timing\\n- Whether the G1 loss was preventable given the BUG hand\\n\\nBe direct and critical. Do not hedge. Format your response as:\\n\\nSCORES (1-10):\\n- BUG play quality: X/10\\n- Storm play quality: X/10  \\n- Model realism: X/10\\n- Overall: X/10\\n\\nCORRECT PLAYS (list each with game/turn/why)\\n\\nERRORS (list each with game/turn/why)\\n\\nSUBOPTIMAL PLAYS (list each with game/turn/why)\\n\\nMODEL GAPS (systemic issues, not single plays)\\n\\nVERDICT (2-3 sentences overall assessment)\\n\\nHere is the full match log:\\n\\n${matchText}`;\\n}\\n\\nasync function runJudge() {\\n  const btn = document.getElementById('run-btn');\\n  const loading = document.getElementById('judge-loading');\\n  const output = document.getElementById('judge-output');\\n  const error  = document.getElementById('judge-error');\\n  const status = document.getElementById('judge-status');\\n  const dot    = document.getElementById('status-dot');\\n\\n  btn.disabled = true;\\n  loading.style.display = 'flex';\\n  output.style.display = 'none';\\n  error.style.display  = 'none';\\n  dot.style.background = 'var(--gold)';\\n\\n  const steps = [\\n    'Sending match log to Claude\\u2026',\\n    'Analysing G1 Thoughtseize sequencing\\u2026',\\n    'Evaluating counter usage across all games\\u2026',\\n    'Reviewing Storm combo lines\\u2026',\\n    'Assessing model realism\\u2026',\\n  ];\\n  let step = 0;\\n  const ticker = setInterval(() => {\\n    status.textContent = steps[Math.min(++step, steps.length-1)];\\n  }, 2800);\\n\\n  try {\\n    const resp = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', {\\n      method: 'POST',\\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\\n      body: JSON.stringify({\\n        model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',\\n        max_tokens: 1000,\\n        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: buildPrompt() }]\\n      })\\n    });\\n\\n    clearInterval(ticker);\\n    const data = await resp.json();\\n    const text = data.content?.map(b => b.text || '').join('') || '';\\n\\n    if (!text) throw new Error('Empty response from API');\\n\\n    renderJudgeOutput(text);\\n    dot.style.background = 'var(--green)';\\n\\n  } catch(e) {\\n    clearInterval(ticker);\\n    error.textContent = ['BUG play quality','Storm play quality','Model realism','Overall'];\\n  const scoreHtml = scoreKeys.map(k => {\\n    const v = scores[k] ?? '?';\\n    const color = v >= 8 ? 'var(--green)' : v >= 6 ? 'var(--gold)' : 'var(--red)';\\n    return `<div class=\\\"score-box\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"score-num\\\" style=\\\"color:${color}\\\">${v}</div>\\n      <div class=\\\"score-label\\\">${k}</div>\\n    </div>`;\\n  }).join('');\\n\\n  // Parse sections\\n  function extractSection(title, type) {\\n    const re = new RegExp(`${title}[\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\S]*?(?=\\\\\\\\n[A-Z]{2,}|$)`);\\n    const block = raw.match(re)?.[0] || '';\\n    const items = block.split('\\\\n').slice(1).filter(l => l.trim() && !l.startsWith(title));\\n    return items.map(l => `\\n      <div class=\\\"finding ${type}\\\">\\n        <div class=\\\"finding-label\\\">${type.toUpperCase()}</div>\\n        <div class=\\\"finding-text\\\">${l.replace(/^[-\\u2022*]\\\\s*/, '')}</div>\\n      </div>`).join('');\\n  }\\n\\n  const verdict = raw.match(/VERDICT[\\\\s\\\\S]*$/)?.[0]?.replace(/^VERDICT\\\\s*/,'').trim() || '';\\n\\n  output.innerHTML = `\\n    <div class=\\\"judge-section\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"judge-section-title\\\"><span class=\\\"section-icon\\\">\\ud83d\\udcca</span>Scores</div>\\n      <div class=\\\"score-grid\\\">${scoreHtml}</div>\\n    </div>\\n    <div class=\\\"judge-section\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"judge-section-title\\\"><span class=\\\"section-icon\\\">\\u2705</span>Correct Plays</div>\\n      ${extractSection('CORRECT PLAYS', 'correct') || '<div class=\\\"finding info\\\"><div class=\\\"finding-text\\\">None flagged.</div></div>'}\\n    </div>\\n    <div class=\\\"judge-section\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"judge-section-title\\\"><span class=\\\"section-icon\\\">\\u274c</span>Errors</div>\\n      ${extractSection('ERRORS', 'error') || '<div class=\\\"finding info\\\"><div class=\\\"finding-text\\\">No errors found.</div></div>'}\\n    </div>\\n    <div class=\\\"judge-section\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"judge-section-title\\\"><span class=\\\"section-icon\\\">\\u26a0\\ufe0f</span>Suboptimal Plays</div>\\n      ${extractSection('SUBOPTIMAL', 'subopt') || '<div class=\\\"finding info\\\"><div class=\\\"finding-text\\\">None flagged.</div></div>'}\\n    </div>\\n    <div class=\\\"judge-section\\\">\\n \u2500\u2500 Gaea's Cradle: tapped before creatures deployed (timing) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    cradle_idx = content.find(\"'cradle' and not l.tapped\")\n    if cradle_idx > 0:\n        context = content[cradle_idx-200:cradle_idx+200]\n        if 'before' not in context.lower() and 'shepherd' not in context.lower():\n            issues.append({\n                'id': 'CRADLE_TIMING',\n                'card': \"Gaea's Cradle\",\n                'cr': 'CR 605',\n                'oracle': '{T}: Add {G} for each creature you control.',\n                'issue': 'Cradle tapped in bulk at turn start before some creatures deploy. \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    b2b_check = 'b2b_on_board' in content or 'back_to_basics' in content.lower()\n    # Present \u2014 OK\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Wasteland: uncounterable mana ability \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    wl_idx = content.find('ACTIVATED-uncounterable')\n    if wl_idx < 0:\n        issues.append({\n            'id': 'WASTELAND_UNCOUNTERABLE',\n            'card': 'Wasteland',\n            'cr': 'CR 605',\n            'oracle': 'Activated ability (not a spell) \u2014 cannot be countered.',\n            'issue': 'Wasteland activation may be subject to counter checks.',\n            'impact': 'MED',\n            'fix': None\n        })\n\n    return issues\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Strategy audit \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\ndef audit_strategies(content):\n    issues = []\n\n    # Per-deck checks\n    deck_checks = {\n        '_strategy_storm': [\n            ('tap_out_check', 'opp.*tapped\\|tap.*out\\|veil_active',\n             'Storm fires into open countermagic. Should check opponent tapped out OR Veil active.',\n             'HIGH', 'fix_storm_tapout'),\n            ('veil_before_combo', 'veil.*before\\|before.*tendrils',\n             'Storm should cast Veil BEFORE Infernal Tutor/Tendrils to protect the chain.',\n             'HIGH', 'fix_storm_veil_timing'),\n            ('dark_ritual_mana', \"'darkrit'\",\n             'Dark Ritual should produce {B}{B}{B} as mana, not just cast as 1-mana spell.',\n             'HIGH', 'fix_dark_ritual'),\n        ],\n        '_strategy_dimir': [\n            ('fow_pitch_value', '_select_fow_pitch',\n             'FoW pitch should be value-weighted (never pitch Tamiyo/Murktide/Borrower).',\n             'HIGH', None),\n            ('bowm_deploy_timing', 'mirror.*eot\\|eot.*flash\\|flash.*eot',\n             'Bowmasters should be held for EOT flash vs mirror, deployed main phase vs combo.',\n             'MED', None),\n        ],\n        '_strategy_mardu': [\n            ('bolt_priority', 'bolt_priority',\n             'Lightning Bolt target priority: Tamiyo>Bowmasters>small creatures>face.',\n             'HIGH', None),  # Already fixed\n            ('bowm_combat', 'opp_has_blockers',\n             'Bowmasters should hold back in combat unless no blockers.',\n             'HIGH', None),  # Already fixed\n        ],\n        '_strategy_uwx': [\n            ('mentor_with_backup', 'backup\\|fow.*mentor\\|mentor.*fow',\n             'Mentor should only deploy when counter backup available in hand.',\n             'MED', 'fix_mentor_backup'),\n            ('terminus_library', 'library.append.*opponent\\|library.*terminus',\n             'Terminus puts creatures on library bottom, not exile.',\n             'LOW', 'fix_terminus_destination'),\n        ],\n        '_strategy_elves': [\n            ('symbiote_loops', \"'symbiote'.*untap\\|untap.*symbiote\",\n             'Wirewood Symbiote: return elf to hand, untap creature. Not implemented.',\n             'MED', None),\n            ('espirit_exile', \"exile.*espirit\\|espirit.*exile\",\n             'Elvish Spirit Guide: exile from hand for {G}. Currently cast as creature.',\n             'MED', None),\n        ],\n    }\n\n    for fn_name, checks in deck_checks.items():\n        fn_idx = content.find(f'def {fn_name}(player')\n        if fn_idx < 0:\n            continue\n        fn_end = content.find('\\ndef ', fn_idx+1)\n        fn = content[fn_idx:fn_end]\n        \n        for check_id, pattern, description, impact, fix in checks:\n            present = bool(re.search(pattern, fn))\n            if not present:\n                issues.append({\n                    'id': f'{fn_name.upper()}_{check_id.upper()}',\n                    'deck': fn_name,\n                    'issue': description,\n                    'impact': impact,\n                    'fix': fix,\n                    'status': 'MISSING'\n                })\n            else:\n                issues.append({\n                    'id': f'{fn_name.upper()}_{check_id.upper()}',\n                    'deck': fn_name,\n                    'issue': description,\n                    'impact': impact,\n                    'fix': None,\n                    'status': 'OK'\n                })\n\n    # Global checks\n    # Direction agnosticism: no gs.bug/gs.opp in _strategy_* bodies\n    for m in re.finditer(r'\\ndef (_strategy_\\w+)\\(player', content):\n        fn_start = m.start()\n        fn_end = content.find('\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\n        fn_body = content[fn_start:fn_end]\n        \n        bad_refs = [(l.strip(), 'gs.bug' in l or 'gs.opp' in l)\n                    for l in fn_body.split('\\n')\n                    if ('gs.bug' in l or 'gs.opp' in l)\n                    and not l.strip().startswith('#')\n                    and 'player is gs.bug' not in l\n                    and 'player is gs.opp' not in l\n                    and 'caster=player' not in l]\n        \n        for line, _ in bad_refs[:2]:\n            issues.append({\n                'id': f'{m.group(1).upper()}_DIRECTION',\n                'deck': m.group(1),\n                'issue': f'Hardcoded gs.bug/gs.opp reference: {line[:70]}',\n                'impact': 'MED',\n                'fix': 'fix_direction_agnostic',\n                'status': 'ERROR'\n            })\n\n    # opp_can_cast without caster= in strategy fns\n    for m in re.finditer(r'\\ndef (_strategy_\\w+)\\(player', content):\n        fn_start = m.start()\n        fn_end = content.find('\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\n        fn = content[fn_start:fn_end]\n        bad = re.findall(r'opp_can_cast\\([^)]+\\)', fn)\n        bad = [c for c in bad if 'caster' not in c]\n        if bad:\n            issues.append({\n                'id': f'{m.group(1).upper()}_OCC_NOCASTER',\n                'deck': m.group(1),\n                'issue': f'opp_can_cast without caster= ({len(bad)} calls) checks wrong player colours',\n                'impact': 'HIGH',\n                'fix': 'fix_opp_can_cast_caster',\n                'status': 'ERROR'\n            })\n\n    return issues\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Auto-fixes \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\ndef apply_fixes(rules_issues, strategy_issues):\n    content = open('engine.py').read()\n    sim_content = open('sim.py').read()\n    fixes_applied = []\n\n    # Fix: Storm tap-out check\n    def fix_storm_tapout():\n        nonlocal content\n        storm_idx = content.find('def _strategy_storm(player')\n        if storm_idx < 0: return False\n        storm_end = content.find('\\ndef _opp_storm(', storm_idx)\n        fn = content[storm_idx:storm_end]\n        \n        # Find where Storm attempts to fire Tendrils\n        tendrils_idx = fn.find(\"'tendrils'\") \n        if tendrils_idx < 0: return False\n        \n        # Find the condition block before Tendrils resolves\n        old_tendrils = \"tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\"\n        if old_tendrils not in fn: return False\n        \n        new_tendrils = \"\"\"tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\n    # Storm should only go off when safe: opp tapped out OR Veil active this turn\n    # Check if opponent has mana up (untapped lands) \u2014 if so, hold unless desperate\n    opp_mana_up = sum(1 for l in opponent.lands if not l.tapped)\n    veil_protecting = getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False)\n    storm_desperate = player.life <= 4  # opponent about to kill us\n    safe_to_combo = veil_protecting or opp_mana_up == 0 or storm_desperate or gs.turn >= 4\"\"\"\n        \n        new_fn = fn.replace(old_tendrils, new_tendrils)\n        content = content.replace(fn, new_fn)\n        return True\n\n    # Fix: Terminus puts to library bottom not exile\n    def fix_terminus_destination():\n        nonlocal content\n        old_term = \"\"\"            for c in list(opponent.creatures):\n                opponent.exile.append(c.card)   # bottom of library \u2248 exile in a 15T sim\n                opponent.revolt_this_turn = True\n            opponent.creatures.clear()\n            for c in list(player.creatures):\n                player.library.append(c.card)  # OPP gets theirs back (creatures come back)\n            player.creatures.clear()\"\"\"\n        new_term = \"\"\"            for c in list(opponent.creatures):\n                # CR 702.53: Terminus puts creatures on bottom of library (not exile)\n                opponent.library.insert(0, c.card)  # insert at index 0 = bottom\n                opponent.revolt_this_turn = True\n            opponent.creatures.clear()\n            for c in list(player.creatures):\n                player.library.insert(0, c.card)  # bottom of library\n            player.creatures.clear()\"\"\"\n        if old_term not in content: return False\n        content = content.replace(old_term, new_term)\n        return True\n\n    # Fix: Dark Ritual in Storm strategy \u2014 should produce BBB mana\n    def fix_dark_ritual():\n        nonlocal content\n        storm_idx = content.find('def _strategy_storm(player')\n        if storm_idx < 0: return False\n        storm_end = content.find('\\ndef _opp_storm(', storm_idx)\n        fn = content[storm_idx:storm_end]\n        \n        # Find ritual handling\n        ritual_idx = fn.find('mana_ritual')\n        if ritual_idx < 0: return False\n        \n        # Check if ritual gives correct mana (should give +2 net for Cabal Ritual, +2 net for Dark Ritual)\n        # Cabal Ritual: pay BB, get BBB = +1 net. Threshold: pay BB get BBBBB = +3 net\n        # Dark Ritual: pay B, get BBB = +2 net\n        # Currently modelled as mana from ritual as flat value \u2014 verify\n        ritual_region = fn[ritual_idx:ritual_idx+300]\n        log(f\"Dark Ritual region: {ritual_region[:150]}\")\n        return False  # Defer if complex\n\n    # Fix: Brainstorm \u2014 track put-back properly\n    def fix_brainstorm_putback():\n        nonlocal content\n        # Find Brainstorm handling in bug_turn and protagonist_turn\n        # The issue: after drawing 3, we should track which 2 go back\n        # For now: model as draw 1 net (draw 3, put back 2 = net 1 new card)\n        # Plus the 3 Bowmasters triggers still fire correctly\n        # The real improvement is: put back bad cards (duplicate lands, late-game Dazes)\n        # This requires hand evaluation \u2014 complex. Mark as known gap.\n        return False\n\n    # Fix: opp_can_cast missing caster in any remaining strategy fns\n    def fix_opp_can_cast_caster():\n        nonlocal content\n        fixed = 0\n        for m in re.finditer(r'\\ndef (_strategy_\\w+)\\(player', content):\n            fn_start = m.start()\n            fn_end = content.find('\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\n            old_fn = content[fn_start:fn_end]\n            new_fn = re.sub(\n                r'opp_can_cast\\((\\w+),\\s*total_mana,\\s*gs\\)(?!\\s*,\\s*caster)',\n                r'opp_can_cast(\\1, total_mana, gs, caster=player)',\n                old_fn\n            )\n            if new_fn != old_fn:\n                fixed += 1\n                content = content[:fn_start] + new_fn + content[fn_end:]\n        return fixed > 0\n\n    # Fix: direction-agnostic gs.bug/gs.opp refs in strategy fns\n    def fix_direction_agnostic():\n        nonlocal content\n        # These are complex \u2014 need manual inspection. Log them.\n        return False\n\n    fix_map = {\n        'fix_storm_tapout': fix_storm_tapout,\n        'fix_terminus_destination': fix_terminus_destination,\n        'fix_dark_ritual': fix_dark_ritual,\n        'fix_brainstorm_putback': fix_brainstorm_putback,\n        'fix_opp_can_cast_caster': fix_opp_can_cast_caster,\n        'fix_direction_agnostic': fix_direction_agnostic,\n    }\n\n    all_issues = rules_issues + strategy_issues\n    for issue in all_issues:\n        fix_id = issue.get('fix')\n        if not fix_id or fix_id not in fix_map:\n            continue\n        if issue.get('status') == 'OK':\n            continue\n        try:\n            result = fix_map[fix_id]()\n            if result:\n                fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': 'applied'})\n                log(f\"  \u2713 Applied fix: {fix_id} for {issue['id']}\")\n            else:\n                fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': 'deferred'})\n        except Exception as e:\n            fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': f'error: {e}'})\n            log(f\"  \u2717 Fix failed: {fix_id}: {e}\")\n\n    open('engine.py', 'w').write(content)\n    return fixes_applied\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Main audit \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\ndef main():\n    log(\"Starting comprehensive rules and strategy audit...\")\n    \n    content = open('engine.py').read()\n    cards_content = open('cards.py').read()\n    \n    log(\"Running baseline tests...\")\n    passed, stdout, stderr = run_tests()\n    log(f\"Baseline: {'PASS' if passed else 'FAIL'}\")\n    if not passed:\n        log(f\"STDERR: {stderr[:500]}\")\n    \n    log(\"Auditing rules...\")\n    rules_issues = audit_rules(content, cards_content)\n    \n    log(\"Auditing strategies...\")\n    strategy_issues = audit_strategies(content)\n    \n    log(f\"Rules issues: {len(rules_issues)}\")\n    log(f\"Strategy issues: {len(strategy_issues)}\")\n    \n    # Summarise\n    for issue in rules_issues + strategy_issues:\n        status = issue.get('status', '')\n        fix = issue.get('fix', None)\n        log(f\"  [{issue['impact']:4s}] {issue['id']}: {issue['issue'][:60]}\")\n    \n    log(\"Applying automated fixes...\")\n    fixes = apply_fixes(rules_issues, strategy_issues)\n    log(f\"Fixes applied: {len([f for f in fixes if f['status']=='applied'])}\")\n    \n    log(\"Re-running tests post-fix...\")\n    passed2, stdout2, _ = run_tests()\n    log(f\"Post-fix: {'PASS' if passed2 else 'FAIL'}\")\n    if not passed2:\n        log(f\"Test failure: {stdout2[-300:]}\")\n    \n    report = {\n        'timestamp': time.strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S'),\n        'baseline_pass': passed,\n        'postfix_pass': passed2,\n        'rules_issues': rules_issues,\n        'strategy_issues': strategy_issues,\n        'fixes_applied': fixes,\n        'summary': {\n            'total_rules': len(rules_issues),\n            'total_strategy': len(strategy_issues),\n            'high_impact': len([i for i in rules_issues+strategy_issues if i.get('impact')=='HIGH']),\n            'fixes_applied': len([f for f in fixes if f['status']=='applied']),\n        }\n    }\n    \n    json.dump(report, open('results/audit_report.json', 'w'), indent=2)\n    log(\"Audit report saved to results/audit_report.json\")\n    return report\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\nAUDITEOF\necho \"audit.py Would pitch Brazen Borrower, Murktide, Tamiyo.',\\n            'impact': 'HIGH',\\n            'fix': 'add_fow_pitch_selection'\\n        })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Brainstorm: put-back tracking \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Check if we track what goes back to library\\n    bs_idx = content.find('brainstorm_draws')\\n    if bs_idx > 0:\\n        bs_region = content[bs_idx:bs_idx+300]\\n        if 'put_back' not in bs_region and 'Puts back' not in content:\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': 'BRAINSTORM_PUTBACK',\\n                'card': 'Brainstorm',\\n                'cr': 'CR 701.9',\\n                'oracle': 'Draw 3, then put 2 cards from your hand on top of your library.',\\n                'issue': 'Cards \\\"put back\\\" are removed from hand but not actually tracked in library.',\\n                'impact': 'HIGH',\\n                'fix': 'fix_brainstorm_putback'\\n            })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Brainstorm: three separate draw events \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Each of the 3 cards drawn should be a separate draw event for Bowmasters\\n    bs_region = content[content.find('def bug_turn'):content.find('def bug_turn')+5000]\\n    if 'brainstorm_draws' in bs_region and 'bowmasters_triggers(3' in bs_region:\\n        issues.append({\\n            'id': 'BRAINSTORM_DRAWS',\\n            'card': 'Brainstorm / Bowmasters',\\n            'cr': 'CR 603.6a',\\n            'oracle': 'Each card drawn triggers Bowmasters separately.',\\n            'issue': 'Brainstorm fires bowmasters_triggers(3,...) as one event. Should be 3 separate triggers.',\\n            'impact': 'MED',\\n            'fix': 'fix_brainstorm_draw_events'\\n        })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Ponder: single draw correct but no library manipulation \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Acceptable known gap \\u2014 just log it\\n    issues.append({\\n        'id': 'PONDER_LOOK',\\n        'card': 'Ponder',\\n        'cr': 'CR 701.9',\\n        'oracle': 'Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order or shuffle.',\\n        'issue': 'Ponder draws 1 without library look/manipulation. Correct draw count but loses selection power.',\\n        'impact': 'LOW',\\n        'fix': None  # Known acceptable gap\\n    })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Natural Order: sacrifice before counter (CR 601.2b) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Verify fix is in place\\n    no_idx = content.find('def do_natural_order')\\n    if no_idx > 0:\\n        no_fn = content[no_idx:no_idx+400]\\n        sac_pos = no_fn.find('sac_pool')\\n        ctr_pos = no_fn.find('_try_counter')\\n        if sac_pos > ctr_pos and ctr_pos > 0:\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': 'NATORDER_TIMING',\\n                'card': 'Natural Order',\\n                'cr': 'CR 601.2b',\\n                'oracle': 'Additional cost paid as part of casting \\u2014 before stack.',\\n                'issue': 'Counter attempt precedes sacrifice. Sacrifice should happen first.',\\n                'impact': 'MED',\\n                'fix': 'fix_natural_order_timing'\\n            })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Heritage Druid: tap self + 2 others \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    if 'for c in ue[:3]' in content:\\n        issues.append({\\n            'id': 'HERITAGE_TAP',\\n            'card': 'Heritage Druid',\\n            'cr': 'CR 601.2b',\\n            'oracle': '{T}, Tap two other untapped Elves you control: Add {G}{G}{G}.',\\n            'issue': 'Taps any 3 untapped elves instead of Heritage Druid + 2 others.',\\n            'impact': 'HIGH',\\n            'fix': 'fix_heritage_druid_tap'\\n        })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Chalice of the Void: applies to BOTH players \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    chalice_fn = content[content.find('def spell_blocked_by_chalice'):\\n                         content.find('def spell_blocked_by_chalice')+300]\\n    if chalice_fn:\\n        # Good \\u2014 it should fire for both\\n        pass\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Orcish Bowmasters: first draw step draw excluded \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    bowm_fn = content[content.find('def bowmasters_triggers'):\\n                      content.find('def bowmasters_triggers')+600]\\n    if 'draw_step' not in bowm_fn and 'is_draw_step' not in bowm_fn:\\n        issues.append({\\n            'id': 'BOWM_DRAWSTEP',\\n            'card': 'Orcish Bowmasters',\\n            'cr': 'CR 603.6a',\\n            'oracle': 'Whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw each turn.',\\n            'issue': 'Bowmasters may trigger on draw step draw. Exclusion not visible in trigger fn.',\\n            'impact': 'HIGH',\\n            'fix': None  # Check if handled at call site\\n        })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Snuff Out: free only if YOU control a Swamp \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    snuff_idx = content.find(\\\"tag == 'snuffout'\\\")\\n    if snuff_idx > 0:\\n        snuff_region = content[snuff_idx:snuff_idx+300]\\n        if 'swamp' not in snuff_region.lower() and 'Swamp' not in snuff_region:\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': 'SNUFF_SWAMP',\\n                'card': 'Snuff Out',\\n                'cr': 'CR 601',\\n                'oracle': 'If you control a Swamp, you may pay 4 life rather than pay its mana cost.',\\n                'issue': 'Snuff Out free cost not conditioned on controlling a Swamp.',\\n                'impact': 'LOW',\\n                'fix': 'fix_snuff_swamp_check'\\n            })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Force of Negation: only counters NONCREATURE spells \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    fon_idx = content.find(\\\"tag == 'fon'\\\")\\n    # Check that FoN has noncreature restriction\\n    fon_region = content[content.find('Force of Negation'):content.find('Force of Negation')+500] if 'Force of Negation' in content else ''\\n    # FoN is checked \\u2014 low risk\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Gaea's Cradle: tapped before creatures deployed (timing) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    cradle_idx = content.find(\\\"'cradle' and not l.tapped\\\")\\n    if cradle_idx > 0:\\n        context = content[cradle_idx-200:cradle_idx+200]\\n        if 'before' not in context.lower() and 'shepherd' not in context.lower():\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': 'CRADLE_TIMING',\\n                'card': \\\"Gaea's Cradle\\\",\\n                'cr': 'CR 605',\\n                'oracle': '{T}: Add {G} for each creature you control.',\\n                'issue': 'Cradle tapped in bulk at turn start before some creatures deploy. Mis-counts occasionally.',\\n                'impact': 'LOW',\\n                'fix': None  # Known acceptable\\n            })\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Flusterstorm: counter if can't pay copies \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Needs to fire on storm cards specifically \\u2014 verify\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Back to Basics: correctly applied? \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    b2b_check = 'b2b_on_board' in content or 'back_to_basics' in content.lower()\\n    # Present \\u2014 OK\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Wasteland: uncounterable mana ability \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    wl_idx = content.find('ACTIVATED-uncounterable')\\n    if wl_idx < 0:\\n        issues.append({\\n            'id': 'WASTELAND_UNCOUNTERABLE',\\n            'card': 'Wasteland',\\n            'cr': 'CR 605',\\n            'oracle': 'Activated ability (not a spell) \\u2014 cannot be countered.',\\n            'issue': 'Wasteland activation may be subject to counter checks.',\\n            'impact': 'MED',\\n            'fix': None\\n        })\\n\\n    return issues\\n\\n\\n# \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500 Strategy audit \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\ndef audit_strategies(content):\\n    issues = []\\n\\n    # Per-deck checks\\n    deck_checks = {\\n        '_strategy_storm': [\\n            ('tap_out_check', 'opp.*tapped\\\\|tap.*out\\\\|veil_active',\\n             'Storm fires into open countermagic. Should check opponent tapped out OR Veil active.',\\n             'HIGH', 'fix_storm_tapout'),\\n            ('veil_before_combo', 'veil.*before\\\\|before.*tendrils',\\n             'Storm should cast Veil BEFORE Infernal Tutor/Tendrils to protect the chain.',\\n             'HIGH', 'fix_storm_veil_timing'),\\n            ('dark_ritual_mana', \\\"'darkrit'\\\",\\n             'Dark Ritual should produce {B}{B}{B} as mana, not just cast as 1-mana spell.',\\n             'HIGH', 'fix_dark_ritual'),\\n        ],\\n        '_strategy_dimir': [\\n            ('fow_pitch_value', '_select_fow_pitch',\\n             'FoW pitch should be value-weighted (never pitch Tamiyo/Murktide/Borrower).',\\n             'HIGH', None),\\n            ('bowm_deploy_timing', 'mirror.*eot\\\\|eot.*flash\\\\|flash.*eot',\\n             'Bowmasters should be held for EOT flash vs mirror, deployed main phase vs combo.',\\n             'MED', None),\\n        ],\\n        '_strategy_mardu': [\\n            ('bolt_priority', 'bolt_priority',\\n             'Lightning Bolt target priority: Tamiyo>Bowmasters>small creatures>face.',\\n             'HIGH', None),  # Already fixed\\n            ('bowm_combat', 'opp_has_blockers',\\n             'Bowmasters should hold back in combat unless no blockers.',\\n             'HIGH', None),  # Already fixed\\n        ],\\n        '_strategy_uwx': [\\n            ('mentor_with_backup', 'backup\\\\|fow.*mentor\\\\|mentor.*fow',\\n             'Mentor should only deploy when counter backup available in hand.',\\n             'MED', 'fix_mentor_backup'),\\n            ('terminus_library', 'library.append.*opponent\\\\|library.*terminus',\\n             'Terminus puts creatures on library bottom, not exile.',\\n             'LOW', 'fix_terminus_destination'),\\n        ],\\n        '_strategy_elves': [\\n            ('symbiote_loops', \\\"'symbiote'.*untap\\\\|untap.*symbiote\\\",\\n             'Wirewood Symbiote: return elf to hand, untap creature. Not implemented.',\\n             'MED', None),\\n            ('espirit_exile', \\\"exile.*espirit\\\\|espirit.*exile\\\",\\n             'Elvish Spirit Guide: exile from hand for {G}. Currently cast as creature.',\\n             'MED', None),\\n        ],\\n    }\\n\\n    for fn_name, checks in deck_checks.items():\\n        fn_idx = content.find(f'def {fn_name}(player')\\n        if fn_idx < 0:\\n            continue\\n        fn_end = content.find('\\\\ndef ', fn_idx+1)\\n        fn = content[fn_idx:fn_end]\\n        \\n        for check_id, pattern, description, impact, fix in checks:\\n            present = bool(re.search(pattern, fn))\\n            if not present:\\n                issues.append({\\n                    'id': f'{fn_name.upper()}_{check_id.upper()}',\\n                    'deck': fn_name,\\n                    'issue': description,\\n                    'impact': impact,\\n                    'fix': fix,\\n                    'status': 'MISSING'\\n                })\\n            else:\\n                issues.append({\\n                    'id': f'{fn_name.upper()}_{check_id.upper()}',\\n                    'deck': fn_name,\\n                    'issue': description,\\n                    'impact': impact,\\n                    'fix': None,\\n                    'status': 'OK'\\n                })\\n\\n    # Global checks\\n    # Direction agnosticism: no gs.bug/gs.opp in _strategy_* bodies\\n    for m in re.finditer(r'\\\\ndef (_strategy_\\\\w+)\\\\(player', content):\\n        fn_start = m.start()\\n        fn_end = content.find('\\\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\\n        fn_body = content[fn_start:fn_end]\\n        \\n        bad_refs = [(l.strip(), 'gs.bug' in l or 'gs.opp' in l)\\n                    for l in fn_body.split('\\\\n')\\n                    if ('gs.bug' in l or 'gs.opp' in l)\\n                    and not l.strip().startswith('#')\\n                    and 'player is gs.bug' not in l\\n                    and 'player is gs.opp' not in l\\n                    and 'caster=player' not in l]\\n        \\n        for line, _ in bad_refs[:2]:\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': f'{m.group(1).upper()}_DIRECTION',\\n                'deck': m.group(1),\\n                'issue': f'Hardcoded gs.bug/gs.opp reference: {line[:70]}',\\n                'impact': 'MED',\\n                'fix': 'fix_direction_agnostic',\\n                'status': 'ERROR'\\n            })\\n\\n    # opp_can_cast without caster= in strategy fns\\n    for m in re.finditer(r'\\\\ndef (_strategy_\\\\w+)\\\\(player', content):\\n        fn_start = m.start()\\n        fn_end = content.find('\\\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\\n        fn = content[fn_start:fn_end]\\n        bad = re.findall(r'opp_can_cast\\\\([^)]+\\\\)', fn)\\n        bad = [c for c in bad if 'caster' not in c]\\n        if bad:\\n            issues.append({\\n                'id': f'{m.group(1).upper()}_OCC_NOCASTER',\\n                'deck': m.group(1),\\n                'issue': f'opp_can_cast without caster= ({len(bad)} calls) checks wrong player colours',\\n                'impact': 'HIGH',\\n                'fix': 'fix_opp_can_cast_caster',\\n                'status': 'ERROR'\\n            })\\n\\n    return issues\\n\\n\\n# \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500 Auto-fixes \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\ndef apply_fixes(rules_issues, strategy_issues):\\n    content = open('engine.py').read()\\n    sim_content = open('sim.py').read()\\n    fixes_applied = []\\n\\n    # Fix: Storm tap-out check\\n    def fix_storm_tapout():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        storm_idx = content.find('def _strategy_storm(player')\\n        if storm_idx < 0: return False\\n        storm_end = content.find('\\\\ndef _opp_storm(', storm_idx)\\n        fn = content[storm_idx:storm_end]\\n        \\n        # Find where Storm attempts to fire Tendrils\\n        tendrils_idx = fn.find(\\\"'tendrils'\\\") \\n        if tendrils_idx < 0: return False\\n        \\n        # Find the condition block before Tendrils resolves\\n        old_tendrils = \\\"tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\\\"\\n        if old_tendrils not in fn: return False\\n        \\n        new_tendrils = \\\"\\\"\\\"tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\\n    # Storm should only go off when safe: opp tapped out OR Veil active this turn\\n    # Check if opponent has mana up (untapped lands) \\u2014 if so, hold unless desperate\\n    opp_mana_up = sum(1 for l in opponent.lands if not l.tapped)\\n    veil_protecting = getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False)\\n    storm_desperate = player.life <= 4  # opponent about to kill us\\n    safe_to_combo = veil_protecting or opp_mana_up == 0 or storm_desperate or gs.turn >= 4\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        \\n        new_fn = fn.replace(old_tendrils, new_tendrils)\\n        content = content.replace(fn, new_fn)\\n        return True\\n\\n    # Fix: Terminus puts to library bottom not exile\\n    def fix_terminus_destination():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        old_term = \\\"\\\"\\\"            for c in list(opponent.creatures):\\n                opponent.exile.append(c.card)   # bottom of library \\u2248 exile in a 15T sim\\n                opponent.revolt_this_turn = True\\n            opponent.creatures.clear()\\n            for c in list(player.creatures):\\n                player.library.append(c.card)  # OPP gets theirs back (creatures come back)\\n            player.creatures.clear()\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        new_term = \\\"\\\"\\\"            for c in list(opponent.creatures):\\n                # CR 702.53: Terminus puts creatures on bottom of library (not exile)\\n                opponent.library.insert(0, c.card)  # insert at index 0 = bottom\\n                opponent.revolt_this_turn = True\\n            opponent.creatures.clear()\\n            for c in list(player.creatures):\\n                player.library.insert(0, c.card)  # bottom of library\\n            player.creatures.clear()\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        if old_term not in content: return False\\n        content = content.replace(old_term, new_term)\\n        return True\\n\\n    # Fix: Dark Ritual in Storm strategy \\u2014 should produce BBB mana\\n    def fix_dark_ritual():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        storm_idx = content.find('def _strategy_storm(player')\\n        if storm_idx < 0: return False\\n        storm_end = content.find('\\\\ndef _opp_storm(', storm_idx)\\n        fn = content[storm_idx:storm_end]\\n        \\n        # Find ritual handling\\n        ritual_idx = fn.find('mana_ritual')\\n        if ritual_idx < 0: return False\\n        \\n        # Check if ritual gives correct mana (should give +2 net for Cabal Ritual, +2 net for Dark Ritual)\\n        # Cabal Ritual: pay BB, get BBB = +1 net. Threshold: pay BB get BBBBB = +3 net\\n        # Dark Ritual: pay B, get BBB = +2 net\\n        # Currently modelled as mana from ritual as flat value \\u2014 verify\\n        ritual_region = fn[ritual_idx:ritual_idx+300]\\n        log(f\\\"Dark Ritual region: {ritual_region[:150]}\\\")\\n        return False  # Defer if complex\\n\\n    # Fix: Brainstorm \\u2014 track put-back properly\\n    def fix_brainstorm_putback():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        # Find Brainstorm handling in bug_turn and protagonist_turn\\n        # The issue: after drawing 3, we should track which 2 go back\\n        # For now: model as draw 1 net (draw 3, put back 2 = net 1 new card)\\n        # Plus the 3 Bowmasters triggers still fire correctly\\n        # The real improvement is: put back bad cards (duplicate lands, late-game Dazes)\\n        # This requires hand evaluation \\u2014 complex. Mark as known gap.\\n        return False\\n\\n    # Fix: opp_can_cast missing caster in any remaining strategy fns\\n    def fix_opp_can_cast_caster():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        fixed = 0\\n        for m in re.finditer(r'\\\\ndef (_strategy_\\\\w+)\\\\(player', content):\\n            fn_start = m.start()\\n            fn_end = content.find('\\\\ndef ', fn_start+1)\\n            old_fn = content[fn_start:fn_end]\\n            new_fn = re.sub(\\n                r'opp_can_cast\\\\((\\\\w+),\\\\s*total_mana,\\\\s*gs\\\\)(?!\\\\s*,\\\\s*caster)',\\n                r'opp_can_cast(\\\\1, total_mana, gs, caster=player)',\\n                old_fn\\n            )\\n            if new_fn != old_fn:\\n                fixed += 1\\n                content = content[:fn_start] + new_fn + content[fn_end:]\\n        return fixed > 0\\n\\n    # Fix: direction-agnostic gs.bug/gs.opp refs in strategy fns\\n    def fix_direction_agnostic():\\n        nonlocal content\\n        # These are complex \\u2014 need manual inspection. Log them.\\n        return False\\n\\n    fix_map = {\\n        'fix_storm_tapout': fix_storm_tapout,\\n        'fix_terminus_destination': fix_terminus_destination,\\n        'fix_dark_ritual': fix_dark_ritual,\\n        'fix_brainstorm_putback': fix_brainstorm_putback,\\n        'fix_opp_can_cast_caster': fix_opp_can_cast_caster,\\n        'fix_direction_agnostic': fix_direction_agnostic,\\n    }\\n\\n    all_issues = rules_issues + strategy_issues\\n    for issue in all_issues:\\n        fix_id = issue.get('fix')\\n        if not fix_id or fix_id not in fix_map:\\n            continue\\n        if issue.get('status') == 'OK':\\n            continue\\n        try:\\n            result = fix_map[fix_id]()\\n            if result:\\n                fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': 'applied'})\\n                log(f\\\"  \\u2713 Applied fix: {fix_id} for {issue['id']}\\\")\\n            else:\\n                fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': 'deferred'})\\n        except Exception as e:\\n            fixes_applied.append({'issue': issue['id'], 'fix': fix_id, 'status': f'error: {e}'})\\n            log(f\\\"  \\u2717 Fix failed: {fix_id}: {e}\\\")\\n\\n    open('engine.py', 'w').write(content)\\n    return fixes_applied\\n\\n\\n# \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500 Main audit \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\ndef main():\\n    log(\\\"Starting comprehensive rules and strategy audit...\\\")\\n    \\n    content = open('engine.py').read()\\n    cards_content = open('cards.py').read()\\n    \\n    log(\\\"Running baseline tests...\\\")\\n    passed, stdout, stderr = run_tests()\\n    log(f\\\"Baseline: {'PASS' if passed else 'FAIL'}\\\")\\n    if not passed:\\n        log(f\\\"STDERR: {stderr[:500]}\\\")\\n    \\n    log(\\\"Auditing rules...\\\")\\n    rules_issues = audit_rules(content, cards_content)\\n    \\n    log(\\\"Auditing strategies...\\\")\\n    strategy_issues = audit_strategies(content)\\n    \\n    log(f\\\"Rules issues: {len(rules_issues)}\\\")\\n    log(f\\\"Strategy issues: {len(strategy_issues)}\\\")\\n    \\n    # Summarise\\n    for issue in rules_issues + strategy_issues:\\n        status = issue.get('status', '')\\n        fix = issue.get('fix', None)\\n        log(f\\\"  [{issue['impact']:4s}] {issue['id']}: {issue['issue'][:60]}\\\")\\n    \\n    log(\\\"Applying automated fixes...\\\")\\n    fixes = apply_fixes(rules_issues, strategy_issues)\\n    log(f\\\"Fixes applied: {len([f for f in fixes if f['status']=='applied'])}\\\")\\n    \\n    log(\\\"Re-running tests post-fix...\\\")\\n    passed2, stdout2, _ = run_tests()\\n    log(f\\\"Post-fix: {'PASS' if passed2 else 'FAIL'}\\\")\\n    if not passed2:\\n        log(f\\\"Test failure: {stdout2[-300:]}\\\")\\n    \\n    report = {\\n        'timestamp': time.strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S'),\\n        'baseline_pass': passed,\\n        'postfix_pass': passed2,\\n        'rules_issues': rules_issues,\\n        'strategy_issues': strategy_issues,\\n        'fixes_applied': fixes,\\n        'summary': {\\n            'total_rules': len(rules_issues),\\n            'total_strategy': len(strategy_issues),\\n            'high_impact': len([i for i in rules_issues+strategy_issues if i.get('impact')=='HIGH']),\\n            'fixes_applied': len([f for f in fixes if f['status']=='applied']),\\n        }\\n    }\\n    \\n    json.dump(report, open('results/audit_report.json', 'w'), indent=2)\\n    log(\\\"Audit report saved to results/audit_report.json\\\")\\n    return report\\n\\nif __name__ == player.add_to_grave(unmask)\\n        player.remove_from_hand(gris_for_unmask)\\n        player.add_to_grave(gris_for_unmask)\\n        # Strip opponent's best counter\\n        if opponent.hand:\\n            target = (next((c for c in opponent.hand if c.tag == 'fow'), None) or\\n                      next((c for c in opponent.hand if c.tag == 'fon'), None) or\\n                      next((c for c in opponent.hand if c.free_cast_if_blue), None) or\\n                      next((c for c in opponent.hand if not c.is_land()), None))\\n            if target:\\n                opponent.hand.remove(target)\\n                log_fn(f\\\"Unmask (free) \\u2014 discards {gris_for_unmask.name} to GY, strips {target.name}\\\", True)\\n            else:\\n                log_fn(f\\\"Unmask (free) \\u2014 discards {gris_for_unmask.name} to GY\\\")\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 3: Dark Ritual \\u2014 spend {B}, add {B}{B}{B} (net +2) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # Requires at least 1 black source (land or prior ritual output).\\n    # Fire all rituals to maximise mana pool.\\n    has_black_source = (mana >= 1)  # any mana at this point should be black (Swamp/dual/petal)\\n    if has_black_source:\\n        rituals = [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'darkrit']\\n        for r in rituals:\\n            if mana >= 1:  # spend 1B, get 3B\\n                player.remove_from_hand(r)\\n                player.add_to_grave(r)\\n                mana += 2  # net +2\\n                log_fn(f\\\"Dark Ritual ({mana-2}B\\u2192{mana}B)\\\")'''\\n\\nassert old_strategy_start in content, \\\"Pattern not found\\\"\\ncontent = content.replace(old_strategy_start, new_strategy_start)\\nopen('engine.py', 'w').write(content)\\nprint(\\\"Reanimator strategy reordered: Petal \\u2192 Unmask \\u2192 Ritual \\u2192 Entomb \\u2192 Reanimate\\\")\\nEOF\"}"

Disables opp artifacts.\n- Emry, Lurker of the Loch: self-mill 4, cast artifacts from GY\n- Seat of the Synod / Vault of Whispers: artifact lands (tap for U/B)\n- Ancient Tomb: 2 colorless mana for 2 life\n- City of Traitors: 2 colorless, sacrifices if you play another land\n\nStrategy priority order:\n1. T1 Chalice on 1 (via Ancient Tomb/City) \u2014 locks BUG's Push/Brainstorm/Ponder\n2. Emry \u2014 fills GY, recasts artifacts\n3. Urza's Saga \u2014 generates growing tokens, tutors Shadowspear/Pithing Needle\n4. Thought Monitor \u2014 refuel hand\n5. Karn \u2014 tutor win condition or lock piece\n6. Attack with growing army\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys, os\nsys.path.insert(0, '/home/claude/mtg_sim')\n\nimport random\nfrom cards import instant, sorcery, creature, artifact, enchantment\nfrom rules import Card, CardType, Permanent, LandPermanent\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Deck construction \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef make_eight_cast_deck():\n    d = []\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Lands (23) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    #
