produces 2 mana\n        c.life_cost_tap = 2\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # City of Traitors: produces {C}{C}, sacrifice when second land played\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = Card('City of Traitors', CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors=set(), tag='city', produces={'C'}, gy_type='land')\n        c.taps_for = 2\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Seat of the Synod: artifact + land, taps for {U}\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = Card('Seat of the Synod', CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors={'U'}, tag='seat', produces={'U'},\n                 gy_type='land', is_artifact_type=True)\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Vault of Whispers: artifact + land, taps for {B}\n    for _ in range(3):\n        c = Card('Vault of Whispers', CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors={'B'}, tag='vault', produces={'B'},\n                 gy_type='land', is_artifact_type=True)\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Urza's Saga: enchantment land (adds as enchantment not land in sim)\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = Card(\"Urza's Saga\", CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors={'C'}, tag='saga', produces={'C'},\n                 gy_type='land', is_combo_piece=True)\n        c.saga_chapter = 0\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Mishra's Factory: becomes 2/2 artifact creature\n    for _ in range(2):\n        c = Card(\"Mishra's Factory\", CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors={'C'}, tag='factory', produces={'C'}, gy_type='land')\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Inventors' Fair: gain 1 life per artifact, tutor artifact\n    for _ in range(2):\n        c = Card(\"Inventors' Fair\", CardType.LAND, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                 colors={'C'}, tag='fair', produces={'C'}, gy_type='land')\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Artifact Mana (8) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Lotus Petal: 0 cost, exile: add 1 any\n    for _ in range(4):\n        d.append(artifact('Lotus Petal', 0, {}, tag='petal'))\n\n    # Mox Opal: 0 cost, Metalcraft \u2014 tap for any color if 3+ artifacts\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = artifact('Mox Opal', 0, {}, tag='opal', is_combo_piece=True)\n        c.metalcraft_mana = True\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Lock Pieces (4) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Chalice of the Void: X=1, counters all CMC-1 spells\n    for _ in range(4):\n        d.append(artifact('Chalice of the Void', 0, {}, tag='chalice',\n                          is_combo_piece=True))\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Threats / Engines (16) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Thought Monitor: affinity, draw 2\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = creature('Thought Monitor', 6, {'U':2,'generic':4}, {'U'},\n                     2, 2, tag='monitor', flying=True)\n        c.affinity_artifacts = True   # reduces cost by 1 per artifact\n        c.draw_on_etb = 2\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Emry, Lurker of the Loch: affinity, self-mill 4, cast artifacts from GY\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = creature('Emry, Lurker of the Loch', 4, {'U':1,'generic':3}, {'U'},\n                     1, 2, tag='emry')\n        c.affinity_artifacts = True\n        c.self_mill = 4\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Sai, Master Thopterist: creates 1/1 thopter on each artifact cast\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = creature('Sai, Master Thopterist', 3, {'U':1,'generic':2}, {'U'},\n                     1, 4, tag='sai', engine=True)\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Karn, The Great Creator: 4 mana, -2 fetches artifact from SB/exile\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = artifact('Karn, The Great Creator', 4, {'generic':4}, tag='karn',\n                     win_condition=True)\n        c.planeswalker = True\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Shadowspear: 1 mana equipment, +1/+1, lifelink, trample; removes indestructible/hexproof\n    for _ in range(1):\n        d.append(artifact('Shadowspear', 1, {'generic':1}, tag='shadowspear'))\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Interaction (5) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Portable Hole: exile CMC<=2 artifact/creature\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = artifact('Portable Hole', 1, {'W':1}, tag='hole', is_removal=True)\n        d.append(c)\n\n    # Pithing Needle: name a card, its activated abilities don't work\n    for _ in range(1):\n        d.append(artifact('Pithing Needle', 1, {'generic':1}, tag='needle'))\n\n    assert len(d) == 60, f\"8-Cast deck: {len(d)} cards (expected 60)\"\n    return d\n\n\ndef make_eight_cast_sideboard():\n    sb = []\n    # vs Blue (BUG/UWx): Hurkyl's Recall, Spell Pierce, Force of Negation\n    for _ in range(3):\n        sb.append(instant('Force of Negation', 3, {'U':1,'generic':2}, {'U'},\n                          tag='fon', free_cast_if_blue=True))\n    for _ in range(2):\n        sb.append(instant(\"Hurkyl's Recall\", 2, {'U':1,'generic':1}, {'U'},\n                          tag='hurkyl', is_removal=True))\n    # vs Combo: Thorn of Amethyst (noncreature spells cost 1 more)\n    for _ in range(4):\n        c = artifact('Thorn of Amethyst', 2, {'generic':2}, tag='thorn')\n        sb.append(c)\n    # vs Artifact hate: Soul Guide Lantern (GY hate)\n    for _ in range(3):\n        sb.append(artifact('Soul Guide Lantern', 1, {'generic':1}, tag='lantern'))\n    # vs Graveyard: Tormod's Crypt\n    for _ in range(3):\n        sb.append(artifact(\"Tormod's Crypt\", 0, {}, tag='crypt'))\n    return sb\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Utility helpers (self-contained) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef _artifact_count(player):\n    \"\"\"Count artifacts player controls (creatures + artifacts + artifact lands).\"\"\"\n    return (sum(1 for c in player.creatures if getattr(c.card,'is_artifact_type',False) or c.card.tag in ('monitor','emry','sai','karn','shadowspear','hole','needle','petal','opal','chalice'))\n            + sum(1 for a in player.artifacts)\n            + sum(1 for l in player.lands if getattr(l.card,'is_artifact_type',False)))\n\n\ndef _affinity_cost(base_cmc, player):\n    \"\"\"Reduce CMC by 1 per artifact controlled (minimum 0).\"\"\"\n    return max(0, base_cmc - _artifact_count(player))\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Strategy \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef _strategy_eight_cast(player, opponent, gs, total_mana, log_fn, log_entries):\n    \"\"\"\n    8-Cast strategy \u2014 direction-agnostic.\n    player = 8-Cast protagonist, opponent = whoever they're facing.\n\n    Priority:\n    1. Lotus Petal / Mox Opal \u2014 free mana first\n    2. Chalice on 1 (via Ancient Tomb / City) \u2014 lock CMC-1 spells\n    3. Emry \u2014 self-mill, enable GY casts\n    4. Urza's Saga \u2014 tick up, generate Karnstruct tokens\n    5. Sai \u2014 token generator on artifact casts\n    6. Thought Monitor \u2014 refuel hand\n    7. Karn \u2014 tutor answer or lock piece\n    8. Combat\n    \"\"\"\n    from engine import resolve_combat, update_goyf, _try_counter_any\n    mana = total_mana\n    art_count = _artifact_count(player)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Free mana: Lotus Petal \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    for petal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'petal']:\n        player.remove_from_hand(petal)\n        player.exile.append(petal)\n        mana += 1\n        art_count += 1  # petal added to artifacts (in exile, but counts while resolving)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Free mana: Mox Opal (Metalcraft = 3+ artifacts) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    for opal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'opal']:\n        if art_count >= 3:  # Metalcraft active\n            player.remove_from_hand(opal)\n            player.put_artifact_in_play(opal)\n            mana += 1\n            art_count += 1\n            log_fn(\"Mox Opal (Metalcraft \u2014 3+ artifacts)\")\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 1: Chalice of the Void on 1 \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Best T1 play with Ancient Tomb / City (provides 2 colorless)\n    chalice = player.find_tag('chalice')\n    chalice_active = getattr(gs, 'chalice_x', None) == 1\n    if chalice and not chalice_active and mana >= 0:  # X=1 costs 2 mana (XX where X=1)\n        if mana >= 2:\n            player.remove_from_hand(chalice)\n            if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, chalice, log_entries):\n                player.put_artifact_in_play(chalice)\n                gs.chalice_x = 1\n                mana -= 2\n                art_count += 1\n                log_fn(\"\u2605 Chalice of the Void on 1 \u2014 all CMC-1 spells countered\", True)\n            else:\n                player.add_to_grave(chalice)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 2: Emry, Lurker of the Loch \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    emry = player.find_tag('emry')\n    emry_on_board = any(c.card.tag == 'emry' for c in player.creatures)\n    if emry and not emry_on_board:\n        eff_cost = _affinity_cost(4, player)\n        if mana >= eff_cost:\n            player.remove_from_hand(emry)\n            if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, emry, log_entries):\n                player.put_creature_in_play(emry)\n                mana -= eff_cost\n                art_count += 1\n                # Self-mill 4\n                milled = []\n                for _ in range(min(4, len(player.library))):\n                    card = player.library.pop(0)\n                    if card.card_type in (CardType.ARTIFACT,):\n                        player.graveyard.append(card)\n                        milled.append(card.name)\n                    else:\n                        player.graveyard.append(card)\n                        milled.append(card.name)\n                log_fn(f\"Emry, Lurker of the Loch \u2014 mills: {milled[:3]}\")\n            else:\n                player.add_to_grave(emry)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 3: Urza's Saga \u2014 tick and generate Karnstruct \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    # Each Saga land gets a chapter counter each turn\n    for land in [l for l in player.lands if l.card.tag == 'saga']:\n        chapter = getattr(land, 'saga_chapter', 0) + 1\n        land.saga_chapter = chapter\n        if chapter == 1:\n            log_fn(\"Urza's Saga Ch.1 \u2014 can activate (generates {C})\")\n            mana += 1  # Ch.1 produces {C}\n        elif chapter == 2:\n            # Create a 0/0 Karnstruct artifact creature (gets +1/+1 per artifact you control)\n            from rules import Card as RCard, CardType as RCT\n            karn_card = RCard('Karnstruct', RCT.CREATURE, cmc=0, mana_cost={},\n                              colors=set(), tag='karnstruct', gy_type='creature',\n                              subtypes={'Construct'}, base_power=0, base_toughness=0)\n            perm = Permanent(card=karn_card,\n                             controller='b' if player is gs.bug else 'o',\n                             summoning_sick=True)\n            perm.is_artifact = True\n            player.creatures.append(perm)\n            art_count += 1\n            size = art_count  # Karnstruct P/T = # artifacts you control\n            perm.power_mod = size; perm.toughness_mod = size\n            log_fn(f\"Urza's Saga Ch.2 \u2014 Karnstruct {size}/{size} enters\", True)\n        elif chapter >= 3:\n            # Ch.3: tutor 0-1 CMC artifact from library, then sacrifice Saga\n            targets = [c for c in player.library if c.card_type == CardType.ARTIFACT and c.cmc <= 1]\n            if targets:\n                target = targets[0]\n                player.library.remove(target)\n                player.hand.append(target)\n                log_fn(f\"Urza's Saga Ch.3 \u2014 tutors {target.name}\", True)\n            player.lands.remove(land)\n            player.graveyard.append(land.card)\n            log_fn(\"Urza's Saga sacrificed (Ch.3 complete)\")\n            break\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Update Karnstruct sizes (grow with artifact count) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    art_count = _artifact_count(player)\n    for c in player.creatures:\n        if c.card.tag == 'karnstruct':\n            c.power_mod = art_count\n            c.toughness_mod = art_count\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 4: Sai, Master Thopterist \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    sai = player.find_tag('sai')\n    sai_on = any(c.card.tag == 'sai' for c in player.creatures)\n    if sai and not sai_on and mana >= 3:\n        player.remove_from_hand(sai)\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, sai, log_entries):\n            player.put_creature_in_play(sai)\n            mana -= 3\n            log_fn(\"Sai, Master Thopterist (1/4) \u2014 1/1 thopter on each artifact cast\")\n        else:\n            player.add_to_grave(sai)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 5: Thought Monitor \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    monitor = player.find_tag('monitor')\n    if monitor and not any(c.card.tag == 'monitor' for c in player.creatures):\n        eff_cost = _affinity_cost(6, player)\n        if mana >= eff_cost:\n            player.remove_from_hand(monitor)\n            if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, monitor, log_entries):\n                player.put_creature_in_play(monitor)\n                mana -= eff_cost\n                art_count += 1\n                drawn = player.draw(2)\n                log_fn(f\"Thought Monitor (2/2 flying, affinity {eff_cost}) \u2014 draws 2\")\n                from engine import bowmasters_triggers\n                bowmasters_triggers(2, gs, log_entries,\n                                    controller='o' if player is gs.bug else 'b')\n            else:\n                player.add_to_grave(monitor)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Priority 6: Karn, The Great Creator \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    karn = player.find_tag('karn')\n    if karn and mana >= 4 and not any(c.card.tag == 'karn' for c in player.artifacts):\n        player.remove_from_hand(karn)\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, karn, log_entries):\n            player.put_artifact_in_play(karn)\n            mana -= 4\n            # Lotus Petal / Mox Opal \\u2014 free mana first\\n    2. Chalice on 1 (via Ancient Tomb / City) \\u2014 lock CMC-1 spells\\n    3. Emry \\u2014 self-mill, enable GY casts\\n    4. Urza's Saga \\u2014 tick up, generate Karnstruct tokens\\n    5. Sai \\u2014 token generator on artifact casts\\n    6. Thought Monitor \\u2014 refuel hand\\n    7. Karn \\u2014 tutor answer or lock piece\\n    8. Combat\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from engine import resolve_combat, update_goyf, _try_counter_any\\n    mana = total_mana\\n    art_count = _artifact_count(player)\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Free mana: Lotus Petal \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    for petal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'petal']:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(petal)\\n        player.exile.append(petal)\\n        mana += 1\\n        art_count += 1  # petal added to artifacts (in exile, but counts while resolving)\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Free mana: Mox Opal (Metalcraft = 3+ artifacts) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    for opal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'opal']:\\n        if art_count >= 3:  # Metalcraft active\\n            player.remove_from_hand(opal)\\n            player.put_artifact_in_play(opal)\\n            mana += 1\\n            art_count += 1\\n            log_fn(\\\"Mox Opal (Metalcraft \\u2014 3+ artifacts)\\\")\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Priority 1: Chalice of the Void on 1 \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    # \"\"\"\n    Lion's Eye Diamond: {0}, sacrifice \u2192 add {B}{B}{B} but discard your hand.\n    In TES: crack LED BEFORE resolving Burning Wish \u2014 the wish's resolution\n    lets you search for a card before you have to discard, so hand is empty anyway.\n    Simplified: if LED in hand and no other spells left to cast that need hand,\n    crack it for +3 mana.\n    \"\"\"\n    led = player.find_tag('led')\n    if not led:\n        return mana_pool, False\n    # Only crack LED if we have a target to cast with the mana\n    has_target = (player.find_tag('infernal') or player.find_tag('tendrils') or\n                  player.find_tag('echo') or player.find_tag('adnaus'))\n    if has_target:\n        player.remove_from_hand(led)\n        player.exile.append(led)\n        # Discard hand (LED's cost)\n        discarded = list(player.hand)\n        for c in discarded:\n            player.hand.remove(c)\n            player.graveyard.append(c)\n        if discarded:\n            pass  # log elsewhere\n        return mana_pool + 3, True\n    return mana_pool, False\n\n\ndef _chrome_mox_mana(player, mana_pool):\n    \"\"\"Chrome Mox: exile nonartifact nonland card, add 1 mana of its color.\"\"\"\n    moxen = [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'chrome_mox']\n    for mox in moxen:\n        # Find best card to exile (prefer high-cmc spells we have multiples of)\n        pitch_candidates = [c for c in player.hand\n                            if c is not mox and not c.is_land()\n                            and not getattr(c, 'is_artifact_type', False)\n                            and c.tag != 'chrome_mox']\n        if not pitch_candidates:\n            break\n        # Prefer to pitch: cantrip > ritual > other (keep combo pieces)\n        pref = sorted(pitch_candidates, key=lambda c: (\n            0 if c.tag in ('bs','ponder','probe') else\n            1 if c.tag == 'darkrit' else\n            2 if c.tag == 'vos' else 3\n        ))\n        pitch = pref[0]\n        color = next(iter(pitch.colors)) if pitch.colors else 'B'\n        player.remove_from_hand(mox)\n        player.put_artifact_in_play(mox)\n        player.remove_from_hand(pitch)\n        player.exile.append(pitch)\n        mana_pool += 1\n        return mana_pool\n    return mana_pool\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Strategy \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef _strategy_tes(player, opponent, gs, total_mana, log_fn, log_entries):\n    \"\"\"\n    TES strategy \u2014 direction-agnostic.\n    Aggressive fast-mana Storm deck. Goes off T1-2 more consistently than ANT.\n\n    Priority:\n    1. Lotus Petal (free mana)\n    2. Chrome Mox (free mana, exile a card)\n    3. Veil of Summer (BEFORE the combo \u2014 protects everything)\n    4. Gitaxian Probe (free info + storm count + draw)\n    5. Dark Ritual (mana acceleration)\n    6. Burning Wish (fetch Tendrils or Empty from SB)\n    7. Infernal Tutor (hellbent \u2192 any card)\n    8. Echo of Eons (refuel if needed)\n    9. Tendrils (win)\n    \"\"\"\n    from engine import _try_counter_any, bowmasters_triggers, resolve_combat, combat_declare\n    mana = total_mana\n\n    # Track spells cast this turn for storm\n    if not hasattr(player, 'spells_cast_this_turn'):\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn = 0\n\n    # Safety check: opp tapped out OR Veil active\n    opp_mana_up = sum(1 for l in opponent.lands if not l.tapped)\n    veil_up = getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False)\n    storm_desperate = player.life <= 4 or gs.turn >= 5\n    safe_to_combo = veil_up or opp_mana_up == 0 or storm_desperate\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 1: Lotus Petal \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    for petal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'petal']:\n        player.remove_from_hand(petal); player.exile.append(petal)\n        mana += 1\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 2: Chrome Mox \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    mana = _chrome_mox_mana(player, mana)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 3: Gitaxian Probe (free, adds storm count + draw) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    probe = player.find_tag('probe')\n    if probe:\n        player.remove_from_hand(probe); player.add_to_grave(probe)\n        player.life -= 2  # costs 2 life\n        drawn = player.draw(1)\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n        log_fn(f\"Gitaxian Probe (\u22122 life, {player.life}) \u2014 draws 1, sees opp hand\")\n        bowmasters_triggers(1, gs, log_entries, controller='o' if player is gs.bug else 'b')\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 4: Veil of Summer \u2014 cast BEFORE combo if opp has interaction \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    vos = player.find_tag('vos')\n    opp_has_counters = any(c.tag in ('fow','fon','daze','fluster') for c in opponent.hand)\n    if vos and mana >= 1 and opp_has_counters and not veil_up:\n        player.remove_from_hand(vos); player.add_to_grave(vos)\n        gs.veil_active = True\n        mana -= 1\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n        log_fn(\"\u2605 Veil of Summer \u2014 all spells uncounterable this turn\", True)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 5: Dark Ritual \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    if mana >= 1:\n        for rit in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'darkrit']:\n            if mana >= 1:\n                player.remove_from_hand(rit); player.add_to_grave(rit)\n                mana += 2\n                player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n                log_fn(f\"Dark Ritual ({mana-2}\u2192{mana})\")\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 6: Burning Wish \u2192 fetch Tendrils (or Empty the Warrens) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    wish = player.find_tag('burning_wish')\n    if wish and mana >= 2 and safe_to_combo:\n        player.remove_from_hand(wish)\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, wish, log_entries):\n            player.add_to_grave(wish)\n            mana -= 2\n            player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n            # Fetch Tendrils from sideboard (or library as proxy)\n            tendrils_sb = next((c for c in player.library if c.tag == 'tendrils'), None)\n            if not tendrils_sb:\n                # Create one from thin air (wish from SB)\n                tendrils_sb = sorcery('Tendrils of Agony', 4, {'B':2,'generic':2}, {'B'},\n                                      tag='tendrils', win_condition=True, is_combo_piece=True)\n            else:\n                player.library.remove(tendrils_sb)\n            player.hand.append(tendrils_sb)\n            log_fn(f\"Burning Wish \u2192 Tendrils of Agony (storm count {player.spells_cast_this_turn})\", True)\n        else:\n            player.add_to_grave(wish)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 7: Lion's Eye Diamond (crack for mana if going off) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    tendrils_in_hand = player.find_tag('tendrils')\n    if tendrils_in_hand and safe_to_combo:\n        mana, cracked = _crack_led(player, mana)\n        if cracked:\n            player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n            log_fn(f\"\u2605 Lion's Eye Diamond (sac) \u2192 +3 mana ({mana} total, hand discarded)\", True)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 8: Infernal Tutor (hellbent \u2192 any card) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    infernal = player.find_tag('infernal')\n    hellbent = len(player.hand) == 0\n    if infernal and mana >= 2 and hellbent and safe_to_combo:\n        player.remove_from_hand(infernal)\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, infernal, log_entries):\n            player.add_to_grave(infernal)\n            mana -= 2\n            player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\n            # Tutor Tendrils\n            target = next((c for c in player.library if c.tag == 'tendrils'), None)\n            if not target:\n                target = sorcery('Tendrils of Agony', 4, {'B':2,'generic':2}, {'B'},\n                                 tag='tendrils', win_condition=True, is_combo_piece=True)\n            else:\n                player.library.remove(target)\n            player.hand.append(target)\n            log_fn(f\"Infernal Tutor (hellbent) \u2192 {target.name}\", True)\n        else:\n            player.add_to_grave(infernal)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 9: Tendrils of Agony \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\n    storm_count = player.spells_cast_this_turn\n    if tendrils and mana >= 4 and storm_count >= 4 and safe_to_combo:\n        player.remove_from_hand(tendrils)\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, tendrils, log_entries):\n            player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\n            mana -= 4\n            # Storm: (storm_count + 1) copies, each drains opponent 1 life / gains 1\n            damage = storm_count + 1\n            opponent.life -= damage\n            player.life += damage\n            log_fn(f\"\u2605 Tendrils of Agony resolves \u2014 Storm {storm_count}, deals {damage} (TES wins)\", True)\n            gs.game_over = True\n            gs.winner = 'bug' if player is gs.bug else 'opp'\n            gs.win_reason = f\"TES: Tendrils resolves (storm {storm_count})\"\n            gs.kill_turn = gs.turn\n        else:\n            player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\n\n    gs.state_based_actions()\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Mini test suite \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef test_tes():\n    results = []\n\n    # Test 1: Deck size\n    deck = make_tes_deck()\n    assert len(deck) == 60, f\"Deck {len(deck)} != 60\"\n    results.append(\"\u2713 Deck size = 60\")\n\n    # Test 2: Key cards\n    tags = {c.tag for c in deck}\n    for req in ['led','burning_wish','tendrils','darkrit','infernal','vos','fow']:\n        assert req in tags, f\"Missing: {req}\"\n    results.append(\"\u2713 All key cards present\")\n\n    # \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n\\ndef _count_storm(player):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Approximate storm count from GY spells cast this turn.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    return getattr(player, 'spells_cast_this_turn', 0)\\n\\n\\ndef _crack_led(player, mana_pool):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    Lion's Eye Diamond: {0}, sacrifice \\u2192 add {B}{B}{B} but discard your hand.\\n    In TES: crack LED BEFORE resolving Burning Wish \\u2014 the wish's resolution\\n    lets you search for a card before you have to discard, so hand is empty anyway.\\n    Simplified: if LED in hand and no other spells left to cast that need hand,\\n    crack it for +3 mana.\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    led = player.find_tag('led')\\n    if not led:\\n        return mana_pool, False\\n    # Only crack LED if we have a target to cast with the mana\\n    has_target = (player.find_tag('infernal') or player.find_tag('tendrils') or\\n                  player.find_tag('echo') or player.find_tag('adnaus'))\\n    if has_target:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(led)\\n        player.exile.append(led)\\n        # Discard hand (LED's cost)\\n        discarded = list(player.hand)\\n        for c in discarded:\\n            player.hand.remove(c)\\n            player.graveyard.append(c)\\n        if discarded:\\n            pass  # log elsewhere\\n        return mana_pool + 3, True\\n    return mana_pool, False\\n\\n\\ndef _chrome_mox_mana(player, mana_pool):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Chrome Mox: exile nonartifact nonland card, add 1 mana of its color.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    moxen = [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'chrome_mox']\\n    for mox in moxen:\\n        # Find best card to exile (prefer high-cmc spells we have multiples of)\\n        pitch_candidates = [c for c in player.hand\\n                            if c is not mox and not c.is_land()\\n                            and not getattr(c, 'is_artifact_type', False)\\n                            and c.tag != 'chrome_mox']\\n        if not pitch_candidates:\\n            break\\n        # Prefer to pitch: cantrip > ritual > other (keep combo pieces)\\n        pref = sorted(pitch_candidates, key=lambda c: (\\n            0 if c.tag in ('bs','ponder','probe') else\\n            1 if c.tag == 'darkrit' else\\n            2 if c.tag == 'vos' else 3\\n        ))\\n        pitch = pref[0]\\n        color = next(iter(pitch.colors)) if pitch.colors else 'B'\\n        player.remove_from_hand(mox)\\n        player.put_artifact_in_play(mox)\\n        player.remove_from_hand(pitch)\\n        player.exile.append(pitch)\\n        mana_pool += 1\\n        return mana_pool\\n    return mana_pool\\n\\n\\n# \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500 Strategy \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n\\ndef _strategy_tes(player, opponent, gs, total_mana, log_fn, log_entries):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    TES strategy \\u2014 direction-agnostic.\\n    Aggressive fast-mana Storm deck. Goes off T1-2 more consistently than ANT.\\n\\n    Priority:\\n    1. Lotus Petal (free mana)\\n    2. Chrome Mox (free mana, exile a card)\\n    3. Veil of Summer (BEFORE the combo \\u2014 protects everything)\\n    4. Gitaxian Probe (free info + storm count + draw)\\n    5. Dark Ritual (mana acceleration)\\n    6. Burning Wish (fetch Tendrils or Empty from SB)\\n    7. Infernal Tutor (hellbent \\u2192 any card)\\n    8. Echo of Eons (refuel if needed)\\n    9. Tendrils (win)\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from engine import _try_counter_any, bowmasters_triggers, resolve_combat, combat_declare\\n    mana = total_mana\\n\\n    # Track spells cast this turn for storm\\n    if not hasattr(player, 'spells_cast_this_turn'):\\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn = 0\\n\\n    # Safety check: opp tapped out OR Veil active\\n    opp_mana_up = sum(1 for l in opponent.lands if not l.tapped)\\n    veil_up = getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False)\\n    storm_desperate = player.life <= 4 or gs.turn >= 5\\n    safe_to_combo = veil_up or opp_mana_up == 0 or storm_desperate\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 1: Lotus Petal \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    for petal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'petal']:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(petal); player.exile.append(petal)\\n        mana += 1\\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 2: Chrome Mox \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    mana = _chrome_mox_mana(player, mana)\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 3: Gitaxian Probe (free, adds storm count + draw) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    probe = player.find_tag('probe')\\n    if probe:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(probe); player.add_to_grave(probe)\\n        player.life -= 2  # costs 2 life\\n        drawn = player.draw(1)\\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\\n        log_fn(f\\\"Gitaxian Probe (\\u22122 life, {player.life}) \\u2014 draws 1, sees opp hand\\\")\\n        bowmasters_triggers(1, gs, log_entries, controller='o' if player is gs.bug else 'b')\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 4: Veil of Summer \\u2014 cast BEFORE combo if opp has interaction \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    vos = player.find_tag('vos')\\n    opp_has_counters = any(c.tag in ('fow','fon','daze','fluster') for c in opponent.hand)\\n    if vos and mana >= 1 and opp_has_counters and not veil_up:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(vos); player.add_to_grave(vos)\\n        gs.veil_active = True\\n        mana -= 1\\n        player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\\n        log_fn(\\\"\\u2605 Veil of Summer \\u2014 all spells uncounterable this turn\\\", True)\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 5: Dark Ritual \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    if mana >= 1:\\n        for rit in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'darkrit']:\\n            if mana >= 1:\\n                player.remove_from_hand(rit); player.add_to_grave(rit)\\n                mana += 2\\n                player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\\n                log_fn(f\\\"Dark Ritual ({mana-2}\\u2192{mana})\\\")\\n\\n    # \\u2500\\u2500 Step 8: Infernal Tutor (hellbent \\u2192 any card) \\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\u2500\\n    infernal = player.find_tag('infernal')\\n    hellbent = len(player.hand) == 0\\n    if infernal and mana >= 2 and hellbent and safe_to_combo:\\n        player.remove_from_hand(infernal)\\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, infernal, log_entries):\\n            player.add_to_grave(infernal)\\n            mana -= 2\\n            player.spells_cast_this_turn += 1\\n            # \n    for ant, (lo, hi) in KNOWN_BASELINES.items():\n        if ant not in DECKS:\n            continue\n        r = run_any_bo3('show', ant, n_per_matchup)\n        wr = round(r['match_wr'] * 100, Need a single-turn combo chain loop.\n\ncontent = open('decks/tes.py').read()\n\n# Replace the entire _strategy_tes with a proper combo-chain version\nold_strat_start = \"def _strategy_tes(player, opponent, gs, total_mana, log_fn, log_entries):\"\nold_strat_end   = \"\\n\\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 Mini test suite \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\"\n\nstart_idx = content.find(old_strat_start)\nend_idx   = content.find(old_strat_end, start_idx)\nold_strat = content[start_idx:end_idx]\n\nnew_strat = '''def _strategy_tes(player, opponent, gs, total_mana, log_fn, log_entries):\n    \"\"\"\n    TES strategy \u2014 models the actual combo chain within a single turn.\n\n    TES goldfish kill (T1 on play):\n      Swamp \u2192 Lotus Petal \u2192 Lotus Petal \u2192 Chrome Mox (exile cantrip) \u2192\n      Dark Ritual \u2192 Dark Ritual \u2192 Burning Wish (crack LED in response) \u2192\n      Tendrils (storm 7-8) \u2192 lethal.\n\n    Key sequencing:\n    1. Deploy free mana (Petal, Chrome Mox) first \u2014 each counts for storm\n    2. Cast Rituals \u2014 each +2 mana and +1 storm  \n    3. Probe if available \u2014 free info and +1 storm\n    4. Veil of Summer if opp has counters and mana allows\n    5. Burning Wish \u2192 fetches Tendrils from SB (crack LED in response if available)\n    6. Infernal Tutor (hellbent) if no Wish\n    7. Tendrils when (storm+1)*2 >= opponent life\n\n    Storm resets each turn. This strategy fires in one burst when conditions met.\n    \"\"\"\n    from engine import _try_counter_any, bowmasters_triggers, combat_declare\n    import random as _rnd\n\n    # Reset storm counter (accumulated this turn only)\n    storm = 0\n    mana = total_mana\n\n    def cast_spell(card, cost, label):\n        nonlocal storm, mana\n        player.remove_from_hand(card)\n        player.add_to_grave(card)\n        mana -= cost\n        storm += 1\n        log_fn(f\"{label} (mana={mana}, storm={storm})\")\n\n    def cast_spell_exile(card, label):\n        nonlocal storm, mana\n        player.remove_from_hand(card)\n        player.exile.append(card)\n        mana += 1\n        storm += 1\n        log_fn(f\"{label} (mana={mana}, storm={storm})\")\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 1: Lotus Petals (free +1 mana each) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    for petal in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'petal']:\n        cast_spell_exile(petal, \"Lotus Petal\")\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 2: Chrome Mox (exile cantrip/ritual for +1 mana) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    for mox in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'chrome_mox']:\n        pitch = next((c for c in player.hand\n                      if c is not mox and not c.is_land()\n                      and c.tag not in ('chrome_mox','tendrils','infernal','burning_wish','led')\n                      and c.colors), None)\n        if pitch:\n            player.remove_from_hand(mox); player.put_artifact_in_play(mox)\n            player.remove_from_hand(pitch); player.exile.append(pitch)\n            mana += 1; storm += 1\n            log_fn(f\"Chrome Mox (exile {pitch.name}) \u2192 +1 mana={mana} storm={storm}\")\n            break  # one Mox at a time\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 3: Gitaxian Probe (free, draw + storm) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    probe = player.find_tag('probe')\n    if probe:\n        player.remove_from_hand(probe); player.add_to_grave(probe)\n        player.life -= 2\n        player.draw(1)\n        storm += 1\n        log_fn(f\"Gitaxian Probe (\u22122 life, {player.life}) storm={storm}\")\n        bowmasters_triggers(1, gs, log_entries, controller='o' if player is gs.bug else 'b')\n        gs.check_life_totals()\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 4: Dark Rituals (spend 1B, add 3B = +2 net) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    if mana >= 1:\n        for rit in [c for c in player.hand if c.tag == 'darkrit']:\n            if mana >= 1:\n                cast_spell(rit, 1, f\"Dark Ritual +2\")\n                mana += 2  # net effect after cost already deducted\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 5: Veil of Summer (protect combo if opp has open mana) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    vos = player.find_tag('vos')\n    opp_has_counters = any(c.tag in ('fow','fon','daze','fluster') for c in opponent.hand)\n    opp_mana_up = sum(1 for l in opponent.lands if not l.tapped)\n    if vos and mana >= 1 and opp_has_counters and not getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False):\n        player.remove_from_hand(vos); player.add_to_grave(vos)\n        gs.veil_active = True\n        mana -= 1; storm += 1\n        log_fn(f\"\u2605 Veil of Summer \u2014 spells uncounterable (storm={storm})\", True)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 6: Burning Wish \u2192 Tendrils from sideboard \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    wish = player.find_tag('burning_wish')\n    safe = getattr(gs, 'veil_active', False) or opp_mana_up == 0 or gs.turn >= 2 or player.life <= 6\n    if wish and mana >= 2 and safe:\n        # Crack Lion's Eye Diamond in response (discards hand, adds 3 mana)\n        led = player.find_tag('led')\n        if led:\n            player.remove_from_hand(led); player.exile.append(led)\n            # Discard rest of hand (LED's cost, paid before Wish resolves)\n            discarded = [c for c in player.hand if c is not wish]\n            for c in discarded:\n                player.remove_from_hand(c); player.graveyard.append(c)\n            mana += 3; storm += 1\n            log_fn(f\"\u2605 LED cracked \u2014 +3 mana={mana}, hand discarded, storm={storm}\", True)\n\n        player.remove_from_hand(wish); player.add_to_grave(wish)\n        mana -= 2; storm += 1\n        # Fetch Tendrils from SB (library proxy)\n        tens = (next((c for c in player.library if c.tag == 'tendrils'), None) or\n                sorcery('Tendrils of Agony', 4, {'B':2,'generic':2}, {'B'},\n                        tag='tendrils', win_condition=True, is_combo_piece=True))\n        if hasattr(tens, '_in_library') and tens in player.library:\n            player.library.remove(tens)\n        player.hand.append(tens)\n        log_fn(f\"Burning Wish \u2192 Tendrils (storm={storm}, mana={mana})\", True)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 7: Infernal Tutor (hellbent = hand empty) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    infernal = player.find_tag('infernal')\n    hellbent = len(player.hand) <= 1  # only Tendrils left counts as near-hellbent\n    if infernal and mana >= 2 and hellbent and not player.find_tag('tendrils'):\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, infernal, log_entries):\n            player.remove_from_hand(infernal); player.add_to_grave(infernal)\n            mana -= 2; storm += 1\n            tens = (next((c for c in player.library if c.tag == 'tendrils'), None) or\n                    sorcery('Tendrils of Agony', 4, {'B':2,'generic':2}, {'B'},\n                            tag='tendrils', win_condition=True, is_combo_piece=True))\n            if tens in player.library: player.library.remove(tens)\n            player.hand.append(tens)\n            log_fn(f\"Infernal Tutor (hellbent) \u2192 Tendrils storm={storm}\", True)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 Step 8: Fire Tendrils when lethal \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    tendrils = player.find_tag('tendrils')\n    damage   = (storm + 1) * 2   # each copy drains 2\n    if tendrils and mana >= 4 and damage >= opponent.life:\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, tendrils, log_entries):\n            player.remove_from_hand(tendrils); player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\n            storm += 1\n            final_damage = (storm + 1) * 2\n            opponent.life -= final_damage\n            player.life   += final_damage\n            log_fn(f\"\u2605 Tendrils \u2014 storm {storm}, {final_damage} damage, opp at {opponent.life}\", True)\n            gs.game_over = True\n            gs.winner    = 'bug' if player is gs.bug else 'opp'\n            gs.win_reason = f\"TES: Tendrils storm={storm} deals {final_damage}\"\n            gs.kill_turn  = gs.turn\n        else:\n            player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\n            log_fn(\"Tendrils countered\")\n    elif tendrils and mana >= 4 and storm >= 5:\n        # Fire anyway if storm is high even if not technically lethal \u2014 real players do this\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, tendrils, log_entries):\n            player.remove_from_hand(tendrils); player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\n            storm += 1\n            final_damage = (storm + 1) * 2\n            opponent.life -= final_damage; player.life += final_damage\n            log_fn(f\"\u2605 Tendrils \u2014 storm {storm}, {final_damage} damage, opp at {opponent.life}\", True)\n            gs.check_life_totals()\n            if opponent.life <= 0:\n                gs.game_over = True; gs.winner = 'bug' if player is gs.bug else 'opp'\n                gs.win_reason = f\"TES: Tendrils storm={storm}\"; gs.kill_turn = gs.turn\n\n    gs.state_based_actions()\n'''\n\ncontent = content[:start_idx] + new_strat + content[end_idx:]\nopen('decks/tes.py','w').write(content)\nprint(f\"TES strategy rewritten ({new_strat.count(chr(10))} lines)\")\nEOF",

player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\\n            storm += 1\\n            final_damage = (storm + 1) * 2\\n            opponent.life -= final_damage\\n            player.life   += final_damage\\n            log_fn(f\\\"\\u2605 Tendrils \\u2014 storm {storm}, {final_damage} damage, opp at {opponent.life}\\\", True)\\n            gs.game_over = True\\n            gs.winner    = 'bug' if player is gs.bug else 'opp'\\n            gs.win_reason = f\\\"TES: Tendrils storm={storm} deals {final_damage}\\\"\\n            gs.kill_turn  = gs.turn\\n        else:\\n            player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\\n            log_fn(\\\"Tendrils countered\\\")\\n    elif tendrils and mana >= 4 and storm >= 5:\\n        # Fire anyway if storm is high even if not technically lethal \\u2014 real players do this\\n        if not _try_counter_any(player, opponent, gs, tendrils, log_entries):\\n            player.remove_from_hand(tendrils); player.add_to_grave(tendrils)\\n            storm += 1\\n            final_damage = (storm + 1) * 2\\n            opponent.life -= final_damage; player.life += final_damage\\n            log_fn(f\\\"\\u2605 Tendrils \\u2014 storm {storm}, {final_damage} damage, opp at {opponent.life}\\\", True)\\n            gs.check_life_totals()\\n            if opponent.life <= 0:\\n                gs.game_over = True; gs.winner = 'bug' if player is gs.bug else 'opp'\\n                gs.win_reason = f\\\"TES: Tendrils storm={storm}\\\"; gs.kill_turn = gs.turn\\n\\n    gs.state_based_actions()\\n'''\\n\\ncontent = content[:start_idx] + new_strat + content[end_idx:]\\nopen('decks/tes.py','w').write(content)\\nprint(f\\\"TES strategy rewritten ({new_strat.count(chr(10))} lines)\\\")\\nEOF\"}"

Probe fires (storm=1).\n#   But no land drop happens! TES has no land in hand (G1 hand shows 4 non-lands).\n#   mana=0 from land, +Probe -2life, chrome +1 mana... but then what?\n#   Infernal needs 2 mana, LED needs 0 mana but requires hellbent condition.\n#   The strategy doesn't fire Burning Wish (no Wish in hand).\n#\n# Core structural problem: TES needs Burning Wish to fetch Tendrils.\n# Without Wish in hand, it needs Infernal Tutor (hellbent) to find Tendrils.\n# Hellbent = empty hand. But Infernal costs 2 mana. \n# G1 has: LED (free), Chrome (+1 mana exile cantrip), no Rituals, no lands.\n# Max mana this turn = Chrome +1 = 1. Can't cast Infernal (needs 2).\n# Dead hand \u2014 real player mulligans this.\n#\n# The mulligan heuristic needs to know: \"does this hand have a kill line?\"\n# TES keep condition: has a land OR has LED+Chrome+Ritual to make mana\n# AND has a tutor (Wish or Infernal) AND has either Tendrils or enough storm pieces.\n#\n# Quick fix: improve the mana calculation to include LED as a mana source\n# when the deck has a target to cast with it.\n# \n# Also: Probe fires every turn (storm=1) but storm resets \u2014 so we see \n# \"storm=1\" on T1, T2, T3... it's literally resetting each turn.\n# This means the combo chain only assembles when we have BOTH \n# enough pieces AND enough mana in the SAME turn.\n#\n# The real fix: add a \"check if we have a kill line this turn\" function\n# that evaluates hand + mana and only fires if lethal is achievable.\n\n# Check what's in a typical TES opening hand\nfrom decks.tes import make_tes_deck\nimport random\nrandom.seed(42)\nfrom collections import Counter\nkills = 0; mulls = 0\nfor trial in range(1000):\n    deck = make_tes_deck()\n    random.shuffle(deck)\n    hand = deck[:7]\n    tags = Counter(c.tag for c in hand)\n    \n    # Assess kill potential\n    has_land = any(c.is_land() for c in hand if hasattr(c,'is_land') and c.is_land())\n    has_land2 = any(c.card_type.name == 'LAND' for c in hand)\n    mana_sources = tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0) + tags.get('darkrit',0)*2\n    has_tutor = tags.get('burning_wish',0) + tags.get('infernal',0)\n    has_led = tags.get('led',0)\n    base_mana = (1 if has_land2 else 0) + tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0)\n    ritual_boost = tags.get('darkrit',0) * 2\n    total_mana = base_mana + ritual_boost\n    storm_potential = tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0) + tags.get('darkrit',0) + tags.get('probe',0)\n    \n    can_kill = (total_mana >= 2 and has_tutor >= 1 and storm_potential >= 4)\n    if can_kill: kills += 1\n\nprint(f\"TES hands with T1-2 kill potential: {kills/10:.1f}%\")\nprint(f\"(Need tutor + 4+ storm pieces + 2+ mana)\")\nEOF",

mulls = 0\\nfor trial in range(1000):\\n    deck = make_tes_deck()\\n    random.shuffle(deck)\\n    hand = deck[:7]\\n    tags = Counter(c.tag for c in hand)\\n    \\n    # Assess kill potential\\n    has_land = any(c.is_land() for c in hand if hasattr(c,'is_land') and c.is_land())\\n    has_land2 = any(c.card_type.name == 'LAND' for c in hand)\\n    mana_sources = tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0) + tags.get('darkrit',0)*2\\n    has_tutor = tags.get('burning_wish',0) + tags.get('infernal',0)\\n    has_led = tags.get('led',0)\\n    base_mana = (1 if has_land2 else 0) + tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0)\\n    ritual_boost = tags.get('darkrit',0) * 2\\n    total_mana = base_mana + ritual_boost\\n    storm_potential = tags.get('petal',0) + tags.get('chrome_mox',0) + tags.get('darkrit',0) + tags.get('probe',0)\\n    \\n    can_kill = (total_mana >= 2 and has_tutor >= 1 and storm_potential >= 4)\\n    if can_kill: kills += 1\\n\\nprint(f\\\"TES hands with T1-2 kill potential: {kills/10:.1f}%\\\")\\nprint(f\\\"(Need tutor + 4+ storm pieces + 2+ mana)\\\")\\nEOF\"}"
